[{"Name":"Travis Kleczka","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUfu3LL9Or4GwZhmQAPs_IsJZf0tmTVLZSHasLXaHsyblm4rkwtPA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The vibes in this place are spot on. Intimate, cozy, warm, tight but private. Feels like you and a few close friends decided to throw a ramen-party in an upscale little nook in the countryside... Yet you're just in a stripmall. Impressive ambiance, impressive food.

From the excellent service to the perfected, spartan menu, you can't go wrong with anything here. The ramen/soups are splendid, the appetizers are just the right portions and delicious, and the drinks have that special, in house flair to them. The server was lovely, respectful, and prompt, and she even showed me various dishes as they floated by. That small gesture, paired with her kindness and explanation, accompanied by phenomenal culinary execution will keep me coming back.

Added notes: good music, great utensils and serving plates, and a view of the chef as he makes noodles? Yessss please.

Thank you for this gem!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAJ7Ma8W4aO3LCmJNeTGoso&fid=0x0:0x39588cb0dd19d346"],"When":"2025-10-16"},{"Name":"Robert","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXKeWjyQ3iQUkcgdEmyJyz7Xmqg-yGvd9GFrN0OG1Dk3bBEbiqAqw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Good food and quality food. Their water is very tap. For the price of their food. I hope they invest in filtered water.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDmhNTL2EINdMtY2f-WaO-y&fid=0x0:0x39588cb0dd19d346"],"When":"2026-2-28"},{"Name":"Tony Y.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKAQqVdaLgucRu487D8Xk9GL6FZDCmIYWxtUDfFhz3RFPIvhlou=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a pleasant surprise discovering this new spot near work!

The broth was the highlight—clean, flavorful, and with a long-lasting finish. You can tell they take their time to make it right, using good ingredients and a careful cooking process. When the broth is this good, you know the rest of the bowl is made with just as much care.

Their attention to detail really stands out. The house-made noodles have a great texture—firm but not too chewy, soaking up the broth perfectly. Even the plates and bowls they use feel thoughtfully chosen, very well put together.

The menu is simple but filled with traditional yet refined dishes. Even though they just opened, I already noticed customers coming back, which says a lot. I’ll definitely be returning to try more from their menu.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDQjYfvbA&fid=0x0:0x39588cb0dd19d346"],"When":"2025-3-13"},{"Name":"EVELINE H.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLiDNaKN8pUixG1OJKUyUH0A7F3tR70_aHpqcFVVvdvMgwUZA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very interesting family own small Asian fusion restaurant, kind of fine dinning taste. Just opened approximately 4 months. We ordered half Honey half BBQ wings and Karaage, Signature Duck Ramen and Curry Beef Rib finger were all very tasty.  Highly recommended 👍","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEOTh4pfUtYaaWQ&fid=0x0:0x39588cb0dd19d346"],"When":"2025-5-12"},{"Name":"Alvin Wang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV6z1Uf501_KloMSBCHMgksrNyU6PtO_25hSl4tY2i2nIETRinR=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was super lucky to stumble upon this newly opened restaurant, the owner told me they are still on the soft opening stage so a lot of menu items may rotate. Everything was super delicious and unique in a way. You can tell the chef spent a lot of time and effort into developing his crafts. The staff were super friendly and accommodating as well. The whole decor is unique in a way it feels like someone’s home instead of a business, very welcoming. Highly recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICf3amraQ&fid=0x0:0x39588cb0dd19d346"],"When":"2024-12-31"},{"Name":"Rick","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJXugyULXwGHpA_1gwlhtK8WO_BTG_LIcRw3l07IRXk5O8xQw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Visited on a Saturday night before close. No line, excellent house made ramen noodle, great atmosphere.  Owner put in lots of effort to make this place feel like home.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAiSFFexJYyK5FG1k-O7hRl&fid=0x0:0x39588cb0dd19d346"],"When":"2026-2-22"},{"Name":"Vincent Shieh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW_T1KLs891ZGfrCSYU1sbbDYreObvyOV7v1xvrCM9QVmQUO78=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food and atmosphere are TOP TIER!!! I really loved how delicious and fresh all the food options are. Everything that is fried is so light, not greasy, yet still perfectly crispy. Absolute perfection! The atmosphere was so wonderful too, it felt like I was eating at my friend’s house. So comfortable and relaxing. There was even live music outside! I don’t think that was a normal part of the experience, but it sounds like every now and then there is live music. Would highly recommend Yakamoz to anyone! Thank you guys for the amazing experience!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"yiying huang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLwEL9Cl9Rq3h9lCmyhmkG_lDPNpFuLCD7bx9r1rH1cHJ1DH30=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Looking for a restaurant that’s yummy, filling and delicious? Well you have came to the right place.This restaurant has great service. They provide amazing food and have a cute atmosphere. Another thing I love about this restaurant is that they have very sweet employees. My personal favorite thing on the menu is the broccoli. It’s juicy, filling and delicious! I also loved the content music and cute decorations. I highly recommend this restaurant! Will you try this restaurant?","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDA8sfvvwE&fid=0x0:0x39588cb0dd19d346"],"When":"2025-2-8"}]

[{"Name":"Max Ives","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXARVO1MMSv7LmSyn9kxO-2bpExgtnxo0epmE-jufDmqsQiIMg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"An excellent mall for family outings, with many great and diverse restaurants, including my favorite, Wood Ranch, which has amazing ribs. There’s a movie theater, escape rooms, hobby shops, and much more. Of course, all the major brands are represented.

The architecture is beautiful, with fountains and lawns, and there are always various events happening. It’s a great place to spend time with family or friends. There’s plenty to keep kids of different ages entertained, and it’s also a wonderful spot for a date.

Highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB0673kNXHnY8XvV9fZyYfv&fid=0x0:0x173ebe3b81ea7942"],"When":"2026-3-2"},{"Name":"Jade","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIR_AObKWGynkq6vIbGQuhQzNHPJ9DIDkr44e87nPUdfEut9g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently visited the Irvine Spectrum and had a great experience there. One of the best things about it is the huge variety of food options—you can find places like Panda Express, Chipotle, pho restaurants, and so much more, so there’s really something for everyone. The shopping selection is also impressive with many well-known clothing stores, including trendy spots like Aritzia, and it’s always fun to walk around and explore. Recently, they added a lot of decorative lights throughout the area, making the whole place feel warm, festive, and beautiful at night. They even set up an ice-skating rink for the season, which adds such a charming and lively vibe.
I also appreciate how clean and well-maintained the entire area is, and the staff and security make it feel safe and welcoming. Although parking can get busy, the multiple structures usually make it manageable. I love strolling around the outdoor spaces, especially on nice days, and the fountains and seating areas make it easy to relax between shops. There are plenty of entertainment options too, like the movie theater and the Ferris wheel, which looks especially stunning with its colorful lights in the evening.
Every visit to the Spectrum feels like a small getaway because of the vibrant atmosphere and constant new additions. I always end up staying longer than I planned, whether I’m shopping, eating, or just hanging out. It’s truly one of my favorite places to spend time, and I’m already looking forward to my next trip.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDbA1Tt8pAZdssOknBIUBGo&fid=0x0:0x173ebe3b81ea7942"],"When":"2025-11-19"},{"Name":"Olya Minasian","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWAxejouIBqI_ZJXeOyJkPWwLUvPO2jHMvroIpqYlT27HwB3DMA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The atmosphere is very pleasant, and the entire area is incredibly well-maintained and clean. I love that it’s an outdoor mall—it’s perfect for a stroll while you shop. Keep in mind that it is a very popular spot and gets quite crowded, especially on weekends, but the lively energy makes it worth it. From the iconic Ferris wheel to the great selection of restaurants, there’s always something to do. A beautiful and upscale place for the whole family","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCuOeppJHr4wYjTgO_JuxQV&fid=0x0:0x173ebe3b81ea7942"],"When":"2026-3-8"},{"Name":"Wendy L","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ56s_mbgl3Xqil_2XhIIbSn8a3pU-Mfgm2_N0ZIq5TTSf7wA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Irvine Spectrum is an open-air mall that has retail shops, restaurants, and boutiques. Some highlights I think worth noting about this outdoor mall is it has a ferris wheel, large easy-to-read sign when driving round the area, it’s a well-maintained mall, and it is spacious.

I stopped by here on a weekday to purchase a couple gifts for family members and happened to drop by the Hello Kitty Cafe (oh so nostalgic). It wasn’t too busy or crowded mid-week so it was great to walk around and enjoy some shopping. It was also a beautiful day.

There are plenty of shops here - something for everyone!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDFmkvxwHJKQXvLOPGhmHyC&fid=0x0:0x173ebe3b81ea7942"],"When":"2025-11-4"},{"Name":"Tim K.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVJHqsp83iQbfODObyHDuJWYVG7rm45_geL5iSlXL2TrpCv6Rg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The Spectrum Center delivers one of the most futuristic and visually impressive shopping environments in the region. The architecture feels modern and forward-looking, creating a clean, high-end atmosphere that immediately stands out.

The variety of stores is excellent—there are options for every style, budget, and interest. You can find everything from fashion and tech to lifestyle and specialty shops without feeling limited. The entertainment side is just as strong: a full cinema complex, multiple leisure zones, and a well-designed layout that makes walking around enjoyable rather than tiring.

The food court and dining areas are especially well done. There are choices for every budget—from quick, affordable bites to more premium dining experiences. What really adds value is the amount of seating throughout the center: plenty of places to sit, relax, meet people, or just take a break without feeling rushed.

Another strong point is the landscaping. The plants and greenery are diverse and visually interesting, giving the place a fresh, almost resort-like feel. However, on a personal note, I seem to be allergic to one of the plants there. Every time I visit, I get allergy symptoms, and I still haven’t figured out exactly which plant is causing it.

Overall, Spectrum Center combines futuristic design, strong retail variety, solid food options, and thoughtful public spaces into one of the most enjoyable shopping and social environments around—despite my unfortunate mystery allergy.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAswD9xCZXcK2D5nrFkJPho&fid=0x0:0x173ebe3b81ea7942"],"When":"2026-1-21"},{"Name":"Ratnam Ritesh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU8IZXteTGq0dJWLJtDv6lgnLKLpr2fD3j67VeXWSupG_TM1MPsiQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A beautiful place to spend an evening in Irvine. There are many restaurants, cafés, and stores to explore, along with a movie theater and relaxing outdoor spaces. The place is clean, lively, and well-organized. Parking is easy and digital maps help you find your way around.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCzHfdF306J-bh41laYSkb-&fid=0x0:0x173ebe3b81ea7942"],"When":"2025-11-1"},{"Name":"Ameen Shawwa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWAfB0eWrgwh1WaKp-ecuXrzCPMWnrSLjLYM4KFi36A_K7QxCVi=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently had the pleasure of visiting the Irvine Spectrum Center Mall, and I am absolutely delighted to share my glowing 5-star review of this shopping haven.

From the moment I stepped foot into the mall, I was captivated by its vibrant atmosphere and impressive array of shops and attractions. The mall's modern design and inviting ambiance created the perfect setting for a day of leisurely shopping and entertainment.

The variety of stores at Irvine Spectrum Center Mall is truly impressive. From well-known brands to unique boutiques, there is something to cater to every style and preference. Whether I was searching for the latest fashion trends, home décor items, or specialty gifts, I found myself spoiled for choice at every turn.

In addition to its extensive selection of shops, Irvine Spectrum Center Mall boasts an abundance of dining options to satisfy every craving. From casual eateries to upscale restaurants, there is a culinary delight awaiting every palate. I particularly enjoyed taking a break from shopping to indulge in a delicious meal or refreshing beverage at one of the many restaurants and cafes scattered throughout the mall.

Beyond shopping and dining, Irvine Spectrum Center Mall offers a variety of entertainment options to keep visitors entertained. From catching a movie at the state-of-the-art movie theater to enjoying live performances at the outdoor amphitheater, there is never a dull moment at this bustling destination.

The mall's convenient layout and ample parking make navigating the complex a breeze, while its picturesque surroundings provide a delightful backdrop for leisurely strolls and people-watching.

Overall, my experience at Irvine Spectrum Center Mall exceeded all expectations, earning it a well-deserved 5-star rating. Whether you're a local resident or visiting from out of town, I highly recommend paying a visit to this shopper's paradise. Thank you, Irvine Spectrum Center Mall, for a truly memorable experience--I can't wait to return!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDZMJV900PNW-TcBtpl_ISm&fid=0x0:0x173ebe3b81ea7942"],"When":"2025-10-7"},{"Name":"Corina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLTCx4Cpw6MBIai1vkmQwL36911lWBYp4qNafqLQ18OTbWE5A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Here’s a revised version that includes the holiday features while staying concise:

I recently visited the Irvine Spectrum Mall, and it was absolutely worth the drive from the south! The variety of stores is impressive, catering to every taste and need. Plus, it’s incredibly kid-friendly, with plenty of activities and dining options that the whole family can enjoy. During the holidays, the gigantic Christmas tree, skating rink, and iconic Ferris wheel create an especially magical atmosphere. The vibrant setting and beautiful surroundings make for a great day out. Highly recommend it for anyone looking for a fun shopping experience!​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBlMUxzaHHCOGXG_3NOHTOS&fid=0x0:0x173ebe3b81ea7942"],"When":"2025-12-28"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Linda","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUZyQPorEGUNCpNc-WYokFNr74tW5qdj97SFf30P6DpKu4SeE7Y=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Had the yuzu shoyu ramen combo. Took about 20 minutes for our order to be ready since it was lunch hour. The broth was light and had a stronger yuzu taste that I'd prefer. Food was not bad overall. The meats were thinly sliced and had a charred flavor. Eggs were also cooked nicely. The seating area is shared with the other restaurants since it's in a food court but people come and go so you should be able to find a spot to sit","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDQBxUSRZLsupdd3RorcoJH&fid=0x0:0xd919c8c6e2a4eaa8"],"When":"2025-11-10"},{"Name":"Hyunji Jun","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLlov3LV47iwZ2RX2kopEPm7nRBCz8aUXPXxwOi1P56Qmi79Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I wasn’t expecting much from a food court spot, but this katsu blew me away! The pork is thick, tender, and juicy, with a light and crispy breading that’s just right. Even the rice impressed me—cooked perfectly, not mushy or clumpy. The curry is flavorful, with a good balance of sweetness and spice that ties the whole meal together.

For the price, you get amazing quality! So many places skimp on the meat and overdo the breading, but not here. You can tell they care about getting it right.

It’s in HMART, so the quick service and ample seating make it super convenient. Definitely planning to return!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID_gd2PAw&fid=0x0:0xd919c8c6e2a4eaa8"],"When":"2025-1-24"},{"Name":"Fang Phattha","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX462pjhsgBgBRaPTJgfFeF9eRc0tpcJZI7Z9WFe8v757sdqRFm=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A nice store in H Mart food hall. The ramen is very yummy. It's called spicy ramen but it's not really spicy in my opinion. The service was quick. There are seatings in the the food hall and it's pretty clean. The to-go box was very convenient. I took a bento box home. Everything in the box was arranged that it's very easy to eat. Katsu was delicious.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEO_7mu3QyraggAE&fid=0x0:0xd919c8c6e2a4eaa8"],"When":"2025-5-10"},{"Name":"Dr. Gabi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUShBV-q6--4sGeMh8To_vT6exBBsRA--CXKNK_oOT7zZO3DUOj5Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Star: Tonkatsu Ramen

Let’s start with the showstopper: the Tonkatsu ramen. The broth was absolutely phenomenal—rich, deeply savory, and perfectly seasoned. You can tell it's been simmered for hours to extract every ounce of flavor from the pork bones. It had that velvety, creamy texture that only a true tonkotsu broth can offer. The taste lingered just the right way, warming your entire body with each spoonful.

The noodles were equally impressive. With the perfect firmness and bounce, they had a consistency that held up beautifully in the broth without ever getting soggy. Clearly made with care, they acted as the ideal vessel for soaking up all that delicious umami.

🌶️ Spicy Ramen Worth Sweating Over

We also ordered the spicy ramen, and it did not disappoint. The spice level was bold without being overwhelming, enhancing the flavors rather than masking them. The heat built gently as we ate, and each bite brought a balance of flavor that was clearly intentional. The broth had a slightly different character—more robust, a bit smoky, and layered with depth. Every ingredient, from the perfectly cooked egg to the slices of tender pork, was top-notch.

Fresh Ingredients & Flawless Presentation

Every bowl was a work of art. From the fresh scallions to the bamboo shoots and mushrooms, each ingredient tasted incredibly fresh and contributed to a well-balanced dish. Nothing felt like a filler. Everything had a purpose and elevated the ramen experience.

Service that Feels Like Family

The customer service was absolutely stellar. From the moment we walked in, we were greeted with genuine smiles and warm hospitality. The staff was attentive without being intrusive, happy to offer recommendations and ensure our dining experience was seamless. You could feel that the team really cared about their food and their guests.

Omori Katsu and Ramen is not just another ramen shop—it’s a place where flavor, technique, and hospitality come together beautifully. Whether you’re a ramen aficionado or just someone craving a comforting bowl of noodles, this restaurant offers something truly special. The tonkatsu broth alone is worth the trip, and paired with their flawless noodles and amazing customer service, it’s an experience you’ll want to repeat again and again.

5/5 Stars – Highly Recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAgkg1aMazZoxPdbVj95ews&fid=0x0:0xd919c8c6e2a4eaa8"],"When":"2025-7-27"},{"Name":"Joann Lim","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJaCOhgfjFl6gb7sE9ecjVRgUflqgds9my3YvM3LfQUm04nXZKe=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had the Cheese Katsu and Omori Katsu, and they were amazing! The outside was perfectly crispy, and the inside was so tender—it practically melted in my mouth. What I loved most was that it wasn’t greasy at all!

This spot is located in the H Mart food court in Westpark Plaza, Irvine, making it super convenient. The prices are very reasonable, so it’s perfect for corporate lunch breaks or even students on a budget.

I’m already planning my next visit to try their Curry Katsu and Ramen! Highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID_wZmNZw&fid=0x0:0xd919c8c6e2a4eaa8"],"When":"2025-1-24"},{"Name":"Lindsy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLXSmzb-Xdzt7j1BNI10ixpT8KFIE980_Cm3UMEdw_-6ofFeQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had the best meal at this place! The tonkatsu was perfectly crispy on the outside and tender on the inside—absolutely delicious. Cheese is really really yummy tooooo❤️ The ramen was rich and flavorful, with a broth that tasted like it had been simmering for hours. Everything felt so fresh, and the portions were generous. I’ll definitely be coming back soon!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID_gcuRGw&fid=0x0:0xd919c8c6e2a4eaa8"],"When":"2025-1-24"},{"Name":"Weon Lee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW9otBnCdhLM4-75O8MEcbamovuJYPsbWlSIHgpkTBgDGsLRIYNQQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Curry Katsu is tasty.
You can enjoy pork cutlet with curry 🍛 together.
Price is reasonable ($17.95)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICn99fYswE&fid=0x0:0xd919c8c6e2a4eaa8"],"When":"2024-10-1"},{"Name":"Jose M Lujano","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKlkOKkVbiMm2Q2ZkjSsciVcL4GoLJYxZRSs7riK9zuhJ4KuQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I have eaten here twice.  Had the spicy miso both times. It was good. Spicy too. This is inside the Hmart. Many other little food shops and a central eating area. Prices seem a little high. I would eat here again though. Wait for food preparation was a little long too but there were at least 3 orders in front of me so to be expected.  Overall good 👍🏾","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXIBvfIqjGpXJ-gU7q-uWjfFRwGi2awSf_QiTKdYKdI12kRI5GF=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very delicious food! We got a ramen and a rice bowl theh both were delicious. The ramen was called Spicy TanTan Men and was super flavorful. The rice bowl was called Mentaiko which was also really tasty. The ambiance was super nice and had a great vibe. Would definitely recommend this ramen spot! 🤍🍜","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDMRN5gfi0ZEokneYHYcFui&fid=0x0:0xb085034e0a4c65c6"],"When":"2026-2-11"},{"Name":"Alannah Chaney","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWH-lEDY_EKTCNROVGJO7hhMW09xkRKBUbBSsniGNq_aHw1dPyD=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our server Kenny was very kind and helpful with all our questions. All service members were kind and attentive. I enjoyed my hojicha tea while dining on Marufuku bites (Japanese steam buns with homemade pork chashu) as an appetizer and Chicken Paitan ramen. It was flavorful with the perfect portions of chicken (incredibly juicy), green onions, mushrooms, sprouts, and seasoned soft boiled egg. My husband also thoroughly enjoyed his Hakata Tonkotsu ramen! If you like spicy, I recommend ordering your ramen medium. When dining in you have the option to increase your ramen spice level at your table. Overall the experience was great, we will definitely be dining here again! Our next visit will be to try their happy hour options M-Sun 3pm-5:30pm. Hope you enjoy as much as we did!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDeBtJAzLGYt8NuXAKxLQZL&fid=0x0:0xb085034e0a4c65c6"],"When":"2025-11-2"},{"Name":"Bethany Y","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUOgGeMQdtMOe00AR9q1LQkMVwuUMUbXn5pHyQyPcoANZSoMdQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I ordered the Hakata Tonkotsu DX and the chicken leg, and both were absolutely amazing. The broth was rich and flavorful without being too heavy, and the noodles had the perfect chew. The chicken leg was tender, juicy, and seasoned just right — it paired so well with the ramen.

Everything came out hot and fresh, and the overall experience felt comforting and satisfying. If you’re looking for a ramen spot in Irvine that truly delivers on flavor, Marufuku Ramen is definitely worth it! Highly recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDADTunaJSbk6WpCV-q9cD1&fid=0x0:0xb085034e0a4c65c6"],"When":"2025-11-16"},{"Name":"TK LEE","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUjGqijowH5yMMG_PkR0XSRynDe0oqvubjK5FLY2-3_sKtG2A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The ramen was okay overall. It didn’t have the rich, authentic tonkotsu flavor I was expecting, but it was still decent. The service was fast and attentive, which made the experience better.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDCeW1PKKyQPLy-jDPaLyWj&fid=0x0:0xb085034e0a4c65c6"],"When":"2026-1-27"},{"Name":"Warren Gokkes-Vining","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWpHb1-aSz_gWzRUxAdyZpOBUXqF1a8VPXqDGV0Q94Ssslpa5a5eQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fantastic experience at Marufuku Ramen in Irvine. The ramen was excellent, deep flavorful broth and perfectly cooked noodles. Everything came out exactly as it should.

Service was top-notch. Rene was amazing, friendly, attentive, and made us feel genuinely welcome without being overbearing. That kind of service makes a big difference.

Also, thanks to Nixia for the referral, great recommendation.
Highly recommend. We’ll definitely be back.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"R T","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU_wJ7xCvlQ5VBeWeUZ9tZm9kTqdrF5PAi_AK-Yr3FFMOuACkryGA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Definitely one of best ramen spots we’ve ever found! We happened to stumble upon this spot for an early dinner on the way to a concert nearby since we were craving something warm and this definitely hit the spot!
I got the vegetarian ramen and my friends each got a different type of ramen on the menu. Everyone loved their dish and wished we could have seconds!
The spice was just right! Everyone said their broth was definitely flavorful.
As for the vegetarian ramen, I was impressed with the amount of veggies and tofu, along with the depth of flavor this dish had. I love how each ramen on the menu already comes with just the right amount of toppings along with the soft boiled egg. Unlike other ramen places where you literally have to pay for each topping which should basically be part of the dish to begin with.
I literally think about this ramen often as all the other ramen restaurants we’ve tried so far do not compare to this! But I definitely would recommend and plan to come back whenever I visit the area again!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDVvQmg2ELh8XB_nEGP4N8S&fid=0x0:0xb085034e0a4c65c6"],"When":"2025-9-20"},{"Name":"Elias Bayati","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXk1pO53jkrxJg8I_z1lIeMLC9p-AhDSgat0dHRI9iqc8eb7Xg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Upon finally having the opportunity to dine here, I found the overall experience to be a mix of highs and lows. While the service was commendable and the atmosphere exuded an appealing and vibrant energy, the culinary offerings were somewhat inconsistent.
The fried chicken bao were a definite highlight, showcasing exceptional flavor and texture. However, the chicken ramen, which I had eagerly anticipated, was rather disappointing and fell short of expectations. The rice over chicken bowl was adequate, and the roasted chicken leg, which arrived sizzling on a hot skillet, was a respectable side dish.
In conclusion, while the restaurant excels in creating a pleasant ambiance and providing attentive service, the food itself was a variable experience, with some dishes shining and others failing to impress.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC9_6aA7A1XrBjKoi92kUpu&fid=0x0:0xb085034e0a4c65c6"],"When":"2025-8-2"},{"Name":"Sara S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ6ZNQDTFk7i2w6eoicw6EqNj-JKoTECx7ca2aRXLl76g4b=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I was really looking forward to trying this place based on its high ratings, but it ended up being one of the most disappointing restaurant experiences I’ve had in the past two years of exploring new spots.
We ordered three dishes:
Brussels Sprouts – Usually one of my go-to items, but these were deep-fried and completely lacked flavor. Just greasy with no seasoning or balance.
Fried Shishito Peppers – The peppers themselves were fine, but the dipping sauce was off-putting and didn’t complement the dish at all.
Vegetarian Ramen – This was the biggest letdown. The broth had zero depth or flavor, and overall the dish felt flat and thrown together.
To make it worse, the vegetarian options were very limited and poorly executed. If you’re vegetarian or looking for plant-based dishes, this is not a good place.
I rarely write negative reviews, but this meal felt like a total miss — especially given how well-rated the restaurant is.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDQw9DHLKzTQuqa7XHDDA9n&fid=0x0:0xb085034e0a4c65c6"],"When":"2025-8-30"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Gabriel Winter","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIOlIipur4oVEoH03si1mNWWIqDCnTpVgdD8N6qOgTr-VJriCc=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I tried the curry mazesoba and it truly exceeded my expectations. The flavors were rich and perfectly balanced. Before mixing everything together as recommended, I sampled each component on its own and loved how every ingredient brought something unique to the dish. Once combined, it created an even more delicious and satisfying experience. I would definitely order it again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCDnqLZ3k2nIGxKOR0lAkGo&fid=0x0:0x9fab15f4a53fe132"],"When":"2026-2-25"},{"Name":"Jeni","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVSqK-Mgxi3-tJj1cCAbaRJkvwFfPm7iAIcaOID_Wp0t2XlIE6A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I went here by myself for lunch the other day and then immediately came back the next day with my husband.

The balance of flavors in their deluxe nagoya mazesoba bowl ($19) is absolutely incredible - it contains a poached egg, ajitama, chashu, seaweed, minced pork, green onions, fish powder, and garlic over their thick noodles. the flavors are so balanced and everything mixed together creates the perfect bite - adding vinegar after savoring the richness for a while cuts the fatty goodness and makes not finishing the rest of your bowl impossible.

we also tried their potato croquettes and takoyaki, both delicious and light and crispy, and freshly made to order. The matcha was also very good and a lovely deep green, not too milky or too sweet, but didn’t taste like a mouthful of grass either.

absolutely delighted to have one in the neighborhood.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC_8LGpnywKt5J3ACifMRUL&fid=0x0:0x9fab15f4a53fe132"],"When":"2026-2-1"},{"Name":"Lydia Liem","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWBAndlZ7AYseZWXpqVIu9I-Y5f_ZVvfBSL_e-VL-paLc7-7vaQIg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Suggestion to come in 20-30 min before they open..this restaurant is packed. Unless if u dont mind the wait. Order via QR code. The  chicken karage was okay at least we tried. The rest of the  food is delicious! I like the texture of the noodles. The soup is extra. If you don't want your noodle to be soupy, my suggestion is to share. We also have the deluxe noodles and famiky really like it. 😋 also, they give perfect size or amount of the one small scoop of white rice to finish up with the mince meat! Argh.. so good... anyway..highly recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCY-sPa3gE&fid=0x0:0x9fab15f4a53fe132"],"When":"2025-5-3"},{"Name":"エミリー","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWXf3Pj7aUheyKYWX3BMTTiNTLVMjMPh6bO1leW8cbgraofQz9e=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delicious!! I loved the cream one way better than the original! Wish it was a staple item.

The matcha latte was REALLY good! Not too sweet and had a really great, strong matcha flavour and was mixed really well.

They were playing Linkin Park music and older rock music from early 2000s which I LOVED. It was super nostalgic, haha. I want to come back to try their appetizers! BTW, it’s card only.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDIv-mBXw&fid=0x0:0x9fab15f4a53fe132"],"When":"2025-4-14"},{"Name":"J. Wu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLBvACy4w489SC5r3I5eaiZ7SK3m52QqpR8RQf53t2P0nPnGw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delicious, hearty mazeman and tasty karaage, too! Friendly servers but also busy. Casual atmosphere, which is nice for a relaxed meal. Suggest checking in online to reduce wait time for a table.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBaWI7EI6nPYM5rvLOpPwIE&fid=0x0:0x9fab15f4a53fe132"],"When":"2025-11-28"},{"Name":"johndhchoi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXWK3UIzQte9bBjQxd7NE7Rfm_K0v6qg6AImYMRKZtPpyHl1-k=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you want a quiet mellow place to eat, this is not it. Felt a little like we were eating in the middle of a train station. To be fair we sat right in the middle next to the kitchen and bathroom.

Been to the spot in sawtelle as well. The food was very comparable. We tried many things and one take away was we much preferred the karaage here than the one in japan town.

The mazemen is amazing. Very chewy and tasty. Id hold off on the vineagar tile having several bites as this will give you two very different but enjoyable bites.

Make sure you put your name on the waitlist before going so you dont have to wait as long","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhABfFbO5tKC8QikPFpThVRR&fid=0x0:0x9fab15f4a53fe132"],"When":"2025-9-30"},{"Name":"Jeremy Ly","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVzL5P_fKeRYgtfZ0dmhsAgNNKS5cFUOZkmNTlPSQAp8RWKUz3_=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"No wait time when I went at 2:30pm on a Saturday. The atmosphere was nice a lot of people chatting inside. The staff was friendly. The food was good I got the deluxe and the hanabi fries which were bomb.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAbJ6V7Njlk7vvlA_1eoviE&fid=0x0:0x9fab15f4a53fe132"],"When":"2025-12-28"},{"Name":"Sylver Cheeseman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX5g_lj4iIE1L2txNdBFnutsAhkRTOt0e-07VgurJwas8yaiaFPWw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Maybe would be good if you eat meat, but we got the regular one without pork, and the curry vegan one and I found both to be just okay. The flavor is a bit too intense for my liking, with a lot of raw onion on top. The vegan curry one had a bitter after taste and was more dry. I did enjoy the matcha latte though. Overall I would personally prefer having udon or regular ramen or soba. The service was good and interior was nice and clean.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEKeynMGKgOHmVw&fid=0x0:0x9fab15f4a53fe132"],"When":"2025-5-17"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Kobe N","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKzHQq1cBjED-R4FLXmAmGTlzSW8qTK0nPoPRH7uW8EaetrSw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"HiroNori Craft Ramen was good — solid flavors, quality ingredients, and definitely a comforting bowl. But honestly, I don’t really understand the hype. The broth was tasty but not mind‑blowing, and the overall experience didn’t quite match the level of buzz this place gets. Still worth trying, just not the life‑changing ramen some people make it out to be.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBOyZD8DfTvwW2r_5hTUYJ7&fid=0x0:0x7949b721e679ff7a"],"When":"2026-2-16"},{"Name":"YipeeKaYay","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJmp7w02sYWGaIq_ZsiiTk7Z6n792UJXcrM9Zt0P84Z2yF-sA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Wanted to see what this place is all about, lots of great reviews. Came on New Year eve at 7:34pm and placed our name on the waitlist and was told the wait was at least 1.5 hours with an 80% chance of not getting seated so decided to order take out instead. Quite understandable since they were scheduled to close by 9pm.

While we were waiting for our food, at 7:54pm a text message arrive stating our table is ready. What a bummer! Ironically, our food was already ready but not notified.  Seems everyone on the waitlist was discouraged about the wait time and left.

It is very difficult to rate a restaurant on togo orders because that was not how the chef intended to serve and present the dish.

Both the tonkatsu and shoyu broths were flavorful and both came with half soft boiled egg and two pieces of pork.  Portions are on the smaller side so we opted to add the combo (rice, salad, and a small scoop of poke) for $7.25

Packaging of the order was very itemized and secure. Like all ramen places, the broth was separated from the noodles.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBCToYTG6-bpK88V9iVxd8k&fid=0x0:0x7949b721e679ff7a"],"When":"2026-1-2"},{"Name":"LB","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX1eyMbgsQzA7WBcsrPOK5eueOtyNB11Z478p9puhCZJ8iUWaooCw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A really nice ramen spot in a small strip mall. I went with a friend right before going to the airport. It was a little chilly so ramen hit the spot!

The soup: I don't eat meat and ordered the vegan ramen with thin noodles. It was SO good. Plenty of toppings, good noodles, good broth. I really appreciate a place that offers veggie broth!

The wait: We got there around 11:30 on a Saturday and there was a small wait but it wasn't bad (you put your name in and they provide a pretty accurate estimate). Note that your whole party has to be there to be seated!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBSypTtOdNcBjY-QHcPzK0t&fid=0x0:0x7949b721e679ff7a"],"When":"2025-11-30"},{"Name":"D2778 1","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKYtHN95td_i1SQ6095DDIKK0OTAiP4VLq47tgdM9J2D87ehA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"After a long day, I figured I would finally try another Ramen place.  This was close to my hotel, so here we are.  The last time I had real Ramen was at Ichiran in Yokyo, so it may not be a fair evaluation.  Ultimately, HiroNori was decent.  I had the Shoyu with a side of crispy rice with spicy tuna, and mochi ice cream.  The side was my favorite part of the meal.  A little wasabi with it and would have been hard to beat.  As for the Ramen, I think I would focus more on dried seasonings than the sauces for added spice and flavor.  The mocha ice cream looked amazing, and just could have used some flavor.

The service was good.  The wait staff was attentive and courteous.

The atmosphere depends on what you like.  This place was small and seats a total of about 36 people at once.  All hard surfaces and a mostly younger crowd made it a loud place.  I wore noise canceling earbuds to make it more comfortable for me.  Personally I thought it was too loud.

The food was appropriately priced.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBkXWZKxpmlq2hK2mAA8gyK&fid=0x0:0x7949b721e679ff7a"],"When":"2025-11-19"},{"Name":"kaloni sam","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWVASbUrivC_J53xpMEH2c4Fgb1X-nI-pyNhvN6aIG4pRTqwac=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I loveeeeee this place!! I live in san diego and was so excited to know they have one here in irvine too. When I was visiting my bf we came here for a quick lunch. The food is always amazing and service was quick as well. We were seated right away, no wait. There is plenty of parking in the lot.

Food review:
Chicken karaage: (5/5) YUM. Cooked perfectly and super juicy and tender. The dipping sauce it comes with is tasty!

Tonkotsu ramen: (5/5) The noodles are my favorite here. The broth is also so flavorful and delicious. I got an extra egg as well.

Crispy tuna: (5/5) Delicious! The rice wasn't overly crispy like some places. Super yummy spicy tuna as well and nice sized slice of avo on top.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCVpA9zYGjbf2jBTCXKUkYc&fid=0x0:0x7949b721e679ff7a"],"When":"2025-9-27"},{"Name":"Carl Indriago","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLzHQz9SHYuhzPSM6HRZDaGD7m8QvqIPCCf4aLn5M_lvd6rNLI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I arrived on a school night at 5:30p solo and Kayla was great, seated me right away. My ramen was served quickly and it was delicious. Although I ordered the fried chicken which never appeared, good ramen shop.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDkjwAWAXJaR3skZ1LHGz38&fid=0x0:0x7949b721e679ff7a"],"When":"2025-11-5"},{"Name":"Andy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIvD8NwEVTNqDNHxaw5xXuNcgfaxVwxkTCWuDnVeqsTl8-s9A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"HiroNori is a nice place to try Ramen, the place is small but it is okay for a craft taste and experience, our host was lovely and smiling always, we sat down in no time, was greeted and offered water that tasted like watermelon and lemon, it was Amazing!
We ordered ramen combo with chicken and Tonkotsu, the secret is in the broth it taste very nice and delicious, an extra garlic and spicy paste was offered as well, they add 17% as a service fee (optional) but you can cancel it and pay whatever you want to support the small business.
Overall experience was outstanding and we will be going back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBog3R_CBVgFQeA52dQkgt7&fid=0x0:0x7949b721e679ff7a"],"When":"2025-7-26"},{"Name":"Olena Stoianovska","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX1qJdy5OmbaVEWUt4CWBKJpOtdd0OWnWLVBlyFtVivHJ6c14LZ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I went to NiroNori Craft Ramen yesterday and had a really good experience overall. The food was excellent – everything we tried was fresh, flavorful, and prepared with care. The service was also very nice, the staff was attentive and friendly, which made the visit even more pleasant. The only thing I didn’t enjoy as much was that it felt quite noisy inside, most likely because the restaurant is a bit small. I also think it would be wonderful if there was a patio area, as it would give guests a more relaxed option to dine. Despite that, I left satisfied and would definitely consider coming back in the future.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBUJJSQlQDFHIulRbg5f_b4&fid=0x0:0x7949b721e679ff7a"],"When":"2025-8-23"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Terry Kim","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVLqjkySkFECCEfEXULj4vqF-X8G31JYJh9xKnIx5bggyV26bH9=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I tried the Spicy Black Ramen and really enjoyed it. The noodles were on the thinner side but still nicely cooked, and the chashu was cooked perfectly with a great crispy texture. Overall, the ramen was very flavorful and satisfying.

One big plus is that for an extra $7.95, you can add a California roll, which was also surprisingly good and paired well with the ramen.

Definitely a place I would recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAE2JIzUdm9WuTKTVuLBTxg&fid=0x0:0xadc85846d05182a"],"When":"2026-1-3"},{"Name":"erik thomstad","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXkeQLOYfMMncOTcYfy-nQvYglofr-u706DVv3leGkVPgZ5X5Z2=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"My first visit to Ramen Mura offered a mixed, but mostly positive, experience. I started my meal with the Eel and Avocado Roll, which came out first. The sushi was decent—nothing spectacular, but satisfying enough to start the meal.
Next up was the highly-anticipated Habanero Miso Ramen bowl. This is where Ramen Mura truly shines! Be warned: this ramen is very spicy! It’s intensely hot, but the flavor is exceptionally good. The depth of the broth is impressive, and you can distinctly taste the savory richness of peanut sauce blending with the miso and habanero. The ramen itself was decent, but that unique, spicy-nutty flavor combination is what makes the bowl memorable and worth ordering. You definitely taste the peanut sauce, and the heat level delivers.
While the food had its highs (the ramen!) and its consistency (the sushi), the overall atmosphere was impacted by the service, which felt a little mid-tier. It wasn't poor, but it lacked the attentiveness that turns a good meal into a great experience.
Overall, I recommend Ramen Mura for those seeking an aggressively spicy ramen with a unique, delicious twist. Just set your expectations for the service accordingly","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCDtHGmCi5xZztJMwQSHRxm&fid=0x0:0xadc85846d05182a"],"When":"2025-10-18"},{"Name":"Juan Cardenas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXyklPZbZNe7I45t1tRxRxAci0QwVeX--8QlNO7h9a2NtERZ6Rm=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My wife and I enjoyed this place. Thankfully, it was still open when we got there.
But we got some rolls, which to be frank were not only good but they were also affordable for the size you get.
Please give this place a try.
Also, I didn't try the ramen, so I might need to do that the next time I come and visit.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDXlM2dQA9YyO9KJmVM7llM&fid=0x0:0xadc85846d05182a"],"When":"2025-7-7"},{"Name":"Broski Ross","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLJhK47_F_SkBYZQyOmIxJ_1pv5BUDuX51ZDctsZHrD0c8kxA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"3rd time here I really enjoy coming here. Best service and awesome prices on ramen and sushi. I enjoyed my pork ramen and I always get it. Plenty of parking available during lunch hour. Overall best service.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCST6M0XQ10ahlf_41xsJv6&fid=0x0:0xadc85846d05182a"],"When":"2025-8-22"},{"Name":"Rosemari Martinez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVzaZWnLoZ34KaOvbPCsyusMqrbM425gvgfodprSNgCbytFwQLm=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The food is presented very beautifully arranged, however, for some reason every item I tried tasted like it had some for of sweetness added to the flavor. I had the plum wine here and it tasted really sweet (almost like syrup). The broth for the Miso was sweeter than what I am accustomed to. The tempura had a nice crunch. It is a good amount of food for the price but not my flavor preference.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDO9fjL8QE&fid=0x0:0xadc85846d05182a"],"When":"2022-7-11"},{"Name":"Israel bautista","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV9i9QkrcfKVY40ScTRewkrrHImhFeD4iEoY4K6bfYY9FQ_NgA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Ramen was OK, my fault for choosing pork but in my defense is was a chicken and pork… it was just way more pork. Our appetizers came after lol. Chicken was undercooked or was just dark meet which is yuk. Egg rolls were pretty good. I also really liked the broth in the soup and the little water dispenser was cool lol. The joint is pretty small and can get packed. Next time I will get some Sushi and another soup.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICX-9fg8AE&fid=0x0:0xadc85846d05182a"],"When":"2024-10-21"},{"Name":"Smokey Woods","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJV1mQlRW-EHja9NOw05w2CTTEb1LchjbaaLp5ylj5CuXoEFQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Omg! The black Ramen is the best. Soo tasty I can eat it everyday. This is a comfort food for me but doesn’t feel heavy or greasy. I feel like I made a good choice after eating here. Very good sushi too. Fish is so creamy. My go to place for ramen and sushi.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sophia Gad-Nasr","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXpRtu-WK1MsMewMKfI30BulPgJRHRsBLZqHxi6LJLXNEj4NNZ9=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Horrible. They have ZERO OPTIONS for you if you don't eat pork. Oh, except for tofu. But they do have chicken broth!... with ONLY PORK OR TOFU AS PROTEIN OPTIONS. Why would you have chicken broth if I can't put chicken in it?

I've NEVER been to a ramen spot that forced you to eat either pork, or vegan. We were SO EXCITED to eat here, and it was an INCREDIBLE DISAPPOINTMENT. If you want ramen but don't eat pork, and don't like tofu as your only protein option, do NOT come here.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Christie Alarcon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXXJ4bdHjshYL1JzIqWk8NDwS4G7MCCNcEf0Ft4FMc7JrXpZqnJrw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Enjoyed the green chili shio ramen with added bamboo shoots and seasoned egg.  Just the right amount of spice. The noodles were chewy adding a nice consistency to the meal. We also tried the chicken nanban. It was tender and so tasty! Definitely will try this place again. Felt authentic and the atmosphere was nice.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAHcs9lgfHQIKXk8RkHLvOT&fid=0x0:0xa509d9b4a984624a"],"When":"2026-1-26"},{"Name":"Lauren Lin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXdQy1TicUonznUAfZ69rYbjfr265EawCy-m-pU3ZvwGLjClbCYow=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Service was great, but this ramen restaurant makes really bad broth. They add wayyy too much sesame oil in both the broths that we got. Server recommended the Green Chili Shio Ramen and Shoyu Tsukemen. Both broth were way too light and no flavor, tasted like supermarket ramen with a lot of added sesame oil over it. I would not consider this a broth at all. The ramen also does not blend with the broth they taste like two separate things each with their own souls. Chicken kaarage was good but a ramen restaurant should have good ramen too. This was a dinner we did not enjoy and would not be returning to try other sesame broths. Don't understand why there's a long wait for this place at all!! Irvine really needs better and more ramen restaurants.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhARbVf_I1vc54CuCWT5v1ig&fid=0x0:0xa509d9b4a984624a"],"When":"2026-1-17"},{"Name":"Cindy Chen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV1nqKfgXrmWBgy4hQv5AIQEeWRDNFDnyxT3oty3IqesPnfpvmZ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The pros: the textures of the food here is amazing. The cucumber salad has a lovely crunch, the noodles are springy, the chashu is soft, and the karage is soft and juicy. Whoever designed this menu was definitely a texture eater. In addition, the sauces that come with the sides like karage are pretty good.

The cons: oh man, where do I start.
- the cucumber salad is the worst cucumber salad I have ever had the displeasure of eating. It tastes as if someone sliced up a raw cucumber,  sprinkled some chili powder on top of it, poured a bit of sauce over it, and served it up. No marinating, nothing.
- the Tonkatsu Ramen broth is extremely, extremely salty. Not very rich, which is nice, but sooooo salty. It was impossible to drink the broth.
- You aren't allowed to replace/trade items (e.g. corn, seaweed, egg, green onion, etc) in your Ramen, even if the item you want to replace it with is cheaper than the original item. They only allow you to remove items. If you want something else thats not in the original ramen, you have to add money. No exceptions for allergies or anything.
- The karage was incredibly bland. The only way to get any sort of taste was to dipped it in the sauce. The sauce was good, but sometimes, you just want karage on its own, y'know?
- While the texture of the ramen was amazing, the fact that the taste was lacking meant I ate a lot slower, which, in turn, meant the noodles got soggy and lost the nice texture. It was a vicious cycle.

Overall, this place is great for people that care more about texture than taste, but you gotta eat fast, or you'll lose that too.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCMoN5Jl7CVjVsAMblTHAxP&fid=0x0:0xa509d9b4a984624a"],"When":"2025-12-19"},{"Name":"Minh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWqUAZ6bZ6TMyBcr7k_mXnb93BHV_Or7UTRgojzQ_lidwhKEtu_OA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I've tried dozens of ramen places all over the west coast, but I keep coming back to Kitakata. The noodle texture and the consistency are the main reasons. The noodles are firm and just how I prefer. The broth is savory and full of flavor. The service is always on point.

The seasonal mapo tofu ramen is delicious as it combines two of my well liked dishes. Not too salty. The large portion is perfect for my large appetite.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAkDXDD2HjFWemqWqePjDwx&fid=0x0:0xa509d9b4a984624a"],"When":"2025-11-11"},{"Name":"Juan Moreno","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU7CxFVNWODRdRBEvU8_4SzxtsLxbxl8T465800vTAnQqbhALM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Enjoyed both the started and the main course! The treatment from the waiter was good 👍🏻 and the service once inside was fast.

Only issue is that they were full and made us wait for 20 minutes outside under the warm California weather. Also… for that price I would expect more food!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCf0ellGH3Gay89svC3mfaQ&fid=0x0:0xa509d9b4a984624a"],"When":"2025-10-22"},{"Name":"Manelyk","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKpzTUk6ue9YG-N4HlyhGxsOnXIr8HJxEtoMW7L0wjtsRde1p8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Super nice place relaxing they dont rush you like the costa mesa location ask for Olivia she is super sweet! Delicious and my go to for Ramen. Only bad thing no cash accepted I really hope they reconsider accepting cash before that I was there monthly.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD6649tfN0UBulAW6Sa4fCu&fid=0x0:0xa509d9b4a984624a"],"When":"2025-11-17"},{"Name":"Eri Yoshida","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUNHHtfN56EuGQNSRJgbFOaacbBLi95JSHahv4InnR8tt-lRaY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"There has definitely been a change in the flavor of the soup since they opened. Despite that, we still enjoy the texture of their ramen because we love the noodles. The taste of their soup is okay, but I am obsessed with the kids menu that they offer! I was pleased with the portion of the kid's ramen and you get a side of karage (fried chicken), edamame, a side of ramen toppings, and rice with the seaweed as well.

I recently went back couple of times to eat here. And the soup flavor got way better!! The soup and noodles are delious!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID_6Kn-_gE&fid=0x0:0xa509d9b4a984624a"],"When":"2025-1-21"},{"Name":"박성진","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWNok-iF4_WD3c7rIURDzX9pvMzdcxcVj4i7qjFmyKrME6wp7MHNg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is one of my all-time favorite restaurants in Irvine. The clear broth and chewy noodles are absolutely fantastic. Their summer special, Hiyashi Ramen, is also refreshing and pairs perfectly with all the fresh vegetables. If I ever move back to Korea, I would seriously consider coming back to Irvine just to have this ramen again.👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCSx74zIeQuBZY93efhvtnj&fid=0x0:0xa509d9b4a984624a"],"When":"2025-7-9"}]

[{"Name":"Jamie K","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV7BQC6NJuhOu478gYVgbcU_-QycJkhgHQ4Kc7rR-is_HVhk-hR9A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The base soup is not too greasy nor salty. Larger portions than expected. Pro/con that there are only 4 types of soups to choose from. But makes sense since most Ramen places have few variety. Their salt Ramen was good but the spicy miso tasted like Mala seasoning, which I'm not a fan of. The combo is just rice + whatever topping you choose so it's simple but it tasted great to dip the rice in the Ramen soup. Only wish is for them to have takuan as a default side menu to have a refreshing taste.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDZsbCyQg&fid=0x0:0xc015d5a0180f1e44"],"When":"2023-10-3"},{"Name":"Christie Alarcon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXXJ4bdHjshYL1JzIqWk8NDwS4G7MCCNcEf0Ft4FMc7JrXpZqnJrw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delicious ramen. We tried the black garlic one and our daughter tried the shio with added egg. Small size is perfect for a child or if not too hungry. Husband and I shared a large and it was plenty for both. Inside Mitzuwa. After eating your meal you can get dessert inside the store. Very convenient.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Weina Liu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJnxwF5HfLQqUYLvGXuMZcNghWq32gsy0S39dgDpAUaclU7Yg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The waitress there were so mean and NOT helpful at all. I went there first time today asked what’s their popular dishes, they were cold. Also i ordered Miso soup, they gave me broth has NO ANY SALT in it, when i asked them to please give me some salt, that woman is so mean, didn't even want to give me or help me at all. I asked is their kitchen really doesn’t have any salt, she said no! And said we can give you soy sauce. I don’t like how cold her service is, seems care less about how you think or how you taste the food. If shes my employee, I’ll fire her in a second. Terrible service! Even i liked their Ramen, but i wont be back because of their unprofessional service.  Wish they can have some better new waitress.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICTsey1Wg&fid=0x0:0xc015d5a0180f1e44"],"When":"2024-5-16"},{"Name":"Ronald Song (Old Boy)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKf8oGYeGtgMpcqLSLGXEWCoqGFs4iShWLy16gxcvohfHNUZOaN=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":""Nothing like a bowl of good soup," I always say. I work at a ramen shop (shout out to SLR) so I feel guilty every time I eat here, but their soup is so 🔥 I can't help it. I keep it simple and go with the Shio (salt) Ramen combo with an Ikura Salmon bowl. Comes out perfect every time 👌

Pro Tip #1 Find parking in the BACK of the plaza; there's a rear entrance that gives you direct access

Tip #2 Ask for "mustard" to add to your soup. It's a game changer.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC5qIfFGw&fid=0x0:0xc015d5a0180f1e44"],"When":"2023-10-9"},{"Name":"ilovecali","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXVW4E289R-So05Yh9WJDzFcQhTyQUxxgn2I5SsdRDhT5HQsAUl=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I like the ramen here and it's one of the foods I often come here to eat. However, the ramen I ate here today had cold meat and the broth wasn't very hot. This was my first time eating disappointing food here and I don't think I'll be going again for a while.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDFuOScNQ&fid=0x0:0xc015d5a0180f1e44"],"When":"2023-11-4"},{"Name":"Catherine Fisher","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW62XJZ85ckQNI8KymmeJM9xJea7FPcm7wTfV56wgFj3CqHeiE12w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing ramen, healthy portion and creamy broth.  I got spicy miso broth with pork cheek.  On a day when I’m very sick, the restaurant even included a note on the top to say they hope I feel better.  And I do.  This ramen is made with love and it tastes amazing.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDRwoWwWg&fid=0x0:0xc015d5a0180f1e44"],"When":"2023-4-21"},{"Name":"Cat T.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU7GIfPh5glNQb4hvq0oyEMxPIbbnX9bGT_T9MhSb351kTnZkXu=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best ramen I've ever had. The pork in Combo A was so bomb. Great flavor. Even the rice was delicious. The soup is so tasty. Definitely going to become a regular.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICEp738DA&fid=0x0:0xc015d5a0180f1e44"],"When":"2017-2-14"},{"Name":"Seth","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW6n-MHyc7xB-aqQMOznJKc2FXSrfyisW5mSwURWSEwY2KQo6DL=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Haven’t been there for a while. The meat was cold and chewy (it tasted different from what I had before). The broth was al little oily. Other than that, everything was fine.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDjmv6PeQ&fid=0x0:0xc015d5a0180f1e44"],"When":"2024-5-2"}]

[{"Name":"Taylor Hennessy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIbBKqtz9dX8lMslAb_LDbj-6IQz1WFOx30d71JkD8fNFBMwQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"An absolutely wonderful place - with great food at a great price! I ordered a small size of the "tofu on fire" rice bowl and it was just perfect. Our group also got the spicy garlic edamame which was unforgettably good. Extremely glad we came out here tonight!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAmE2qr3ATqK_NmHlBgPcX-&fid=0x0:0x8556329d95330c15"],"When":"2026-1-25"},{"Name":"ItsBlueMilk","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWDk_5wiYLj2O_z2I0_yGLEOkSfIUTdRQMkY739SirQY8jB85eb=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"On a girls day, my friend and I came to check out this ramen place close to where she lives. The employees are really nice and attentive. The employee took into consideration my friend’s food allergy serving her chicken base instead of pork base. We both did build your own ramen, and it didn’t disappoint. I got a tonkatsu base with my chashu. It was light and creamy. And the topping hit the spot. Would I liked a more richer flavor, yes but still a solid ramen that hits the spot.
The ambiance is relaxing and the extra detail to the chopsticks are quite cute. The wait time was good, and we came around dinner time.
Food: 8/10
Atmosphere: 8/10
Customer Service 10/10","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAwO2YQ3p3te6Mzw-1wEs4u&fid=0x0:0x8556329d95330c15"],"When":"2026-3-8"},{"Name":"Alfa (Alfa)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVPughjNsFbV7yj0V6f6h7PZ8cvExFGE31Y-fxLcwuhsnISl0Rd=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Overall disappointed

Really wanted to give this place a shot given the insanely high praise (even the best spots in OC struggle to stay at 4.7+ star)

At the time we were the only ones there and the day seemed slow, so that may impact the overall experience

The broth was rich and tasty, although noodles were not cooked correctly. Even got a giant chunk that was balled together  and had to chew through it.

Had to order through the app which did not describe what's included in the ramen, and the waiter did not come by to check on us.

Overall decent, but no where the near 5 star praise","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD0TEoRoGb1rPpWdXdb9bbM&fid=0x0:0x8556329d95330c15"],"When":"2026-2-27"},{"Name":"Brittney Tang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUPdFd9ziFEOpkAmRMtetGJsGCoIryYcYvVchZyL3JeBOWxFsVGpw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I liked the atmosphere, it's a nice place to share a meal with friends. The service was fast and the food was yummy! The food did come out at different times, but we were a big party.

Definitely a nice spot for some ramen.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBX__ZiJXms7fUydIkkG5dD&fid=0x0:0x8556329d95330c15"],"When":"2026-2-14"},{"Name":"eluuvio","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXkjcrmWafj5nnx_0Cg9gzuhxscAEJIbSAtJFJg6e0LoomQ6sSU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wow, this place is so amazing! Super flavorful food, amazing service! I think their ordering system is actually really cool, you can order as an entire table- Super handy!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD5her7lGu7CfN_yrHzFn4E&fid=0x0:0x8556329d95330c15"],"When":"2026-1-25"},{"Name":"Sleppu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU65v3E9sUQtu59W_TNwGfByIcPOWUqHUExHvLgqgdtwrmvvQWs=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fast service and delicious food!! The peach sake is so tasty too.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAhT31RPu4yus3YfSqmhpY_&fid=0x0:0x8556329d95330c15"],"When":"2026-1-25"},{"Name":"Jessica Pulido","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK92vCHlUDQK9-Cfo1Fbxo3J1IvloR3gAav148ZmGpZOPW4wQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Ramen was delicious and service was great! So many ramen places around this area but you have to make sure you check this place out. Good portions too and service was fast as well","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA1joXMMbIrrf9HJhRMzvrQ&fid=0x0:0x8556329d95330c15"],"When":"2026-1-17"},{"Name":"Isabella Erickson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIW_nOd9dXmh_YyM5S1m1WLZYzC46O6WtMPHGK-g54rD2qq_g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a great experience at this sushi restaurant with fast, friendly service from start to finish. The staff was attentive and made sure everything came out quickly. The sushi rolls were fresh, flavorful, and beautifully presented. If you want delicious sushi and quick service, this place is definitely worth visiting.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"phoebe anne","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVN1PI8rnqoZKlxGrLN9ByNJhdbx2p-BH46cut1Df8K2wrbdgs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"the ramen was really good! they have a fun ordering system, many customization options! they split our bowl into two when we told them we were sharing, which we've never had anyone do before. it was so thoughtful. the straight noodles were really good! i do recommend blowing on your soup before eating, i definitely burnt my mouth a bit from the hot spicy oil as i was too excited lol.

it was such a friendly, tasty place!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB27HFmo0wXmJZk--Hvw7gE&fid=0x0:0xf0b70c036999fc78"],"When":"2026-1-19"},{"Name":"James Ge","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVcd5GiJ8_dcMsHq_FqGrHbDC9AuBrgUR9smX1ikGnRbnvpLB5s=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"At HIDE-CHAN RAMEN, our ramen starts with a slow-simmered tonkotsu broth, cooked for hours to achieve a deep, creamy richness without heaviness.

We use traditional Hakata-style thin noodles — firm, springy, and designed to perfectly hold the broth. Every element, from soup to noodles, is balanced for clarity, depth, and comfort.

Rooted in Hakata tradition and refined through decades of craftsmanship, our ramen is honest, rich, and deeply satisfying — made the HIDE-CHAN way.
Do respect the guy who is always dedicated to one thing for his entire  life !","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAUx-2hSxycjwBkgP139jIx&fid=0x0:0xf0b70c036999fc78"],"When":"2025-12-24"},{"Name":"Daniel Morgan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXLy0proqW21zeS-8HVfbsIEHYPZDaYG60VzhXu2k-gObfzO_k=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I tried Kashiwa Ramen for the first time and went with the black garlic ramen with chicken broth—absolutely fantastic. The broth was rich and flavorful without being too heavy, and the black garlic added just the right depth. The noodles had a great bite, and everything came together perfectly.

Service was excellent too—attentive without being overbearing, and the food came out quickly even though the place was busy.

Overall, a great ramen spot that hits all the marks: flavor, consistency, and solid service. I’ll definitely be back to try more of the menu.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCQlFNUZQ99kvqQTdQ_FwuX&fid=0x0:0xf0b70c036999fc78"],"When":"2025-10-19"},{"Name":"Sophie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJDN7cB4zkbpe2YeZksI4NFZORhMOce5hIhjF3TYpUjQFKn9Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Kashiwa is a cozy little ramen place. Here, you order ramen by filling out a sheet of choices for type, broth, protein, noodles, taste, and toppings. The ramen prices were on the order form. The menu was more for reference. The ramen was pretty good. We also loved our server. She was friendly and super sweet whenever we ask for anything.

Pro Tip: For taste, don't choose the lite option for broth, especially for miso. I made this mistake and the broth came out pretty plain and diluted with little flavor. My partner got normal and it was much better.

* Karaage 4.5/5 - The fried chicken came out piping hot and fresh. The outside was crispy and scrumptious. The inside was super juicy. It was a bit light in flavor, though. You will want to dip it in the accompanying sauce which was a combination of sweet chili sauce and a sauce that looked like spicy mayo (but lighter and not as good).

* Spicy Miso Ramen 5/5 - The normal spicy miso ramen had great flavor. It came with a half boiled egg, bean sprouts, corn, and butter on the side. The spiciness was between mild and medium. Get the wavy noodles. They're thicker than the straight noodles, so there's more of a bite. The chashu pork was thinly cut and had a charred flavor while still being tender.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEJ_9hea8g-SSiwE&fid=0x0:0xf0b70c036999fc78"],"When":"2025-5-24"},{"Name":"Matthias Buck","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWaQmM9taXaZr1bHmWyJ1n2kVDQHfxr-Ip6W2NPFBQIRL642aoA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best Ramen I ever had. Quick and very friendly Service. Beer on Tap ist super delicious.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDZnWIsylgPQ93ct1btxslP&fid=0x0:0xf0b70c036999fc78"],"When":"2025-10-17"},{"Name":"Nathan R","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUy5L016LC9uaO9-xIybhZYqOo4eWtA7Zd50_7IPiO6hlj4PXrA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"For sure my go to place for tasty ramen.  The food never disappoints and the service is outstanding.
See you soon","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAQNadngOIGerUyctfTXgvj&fid=0x0:0xf0b70c036999fc78"],"When":"2025-12-5"},{"Name":"Faris Memon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWSPJiT-Vi2st2aUmeW7i2XI_Dlyalr0QifvCt2hGE5rtNYsUQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely love this place and it is my go-to for ramen! I don’t eat pork and miss out on the flavor of the broth but they do a killer black garlic ramen. Food comes out quick and is delicious! Has a cozy feel to it and is a lowkey spot that should be more mainstream! Fire!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Serafina Vazquez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWbwlitd2cCaHUwQsLwWpOtGZm8ySy1e6UPnlJjilvXpOr8mmxs5A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best ramen I’ve had in a while!
The broth, sides, and meat were all delicious. I got the original spicy ramen broth with chicken, plus two appetizers — gyoza and chicken with rice — and a pitcher of Sapporo. Everything hit the spot! Great food, great vibes. Highly recommend this place! 🥰","Images":null,"When":""}]
