[{"Name":"Corgan DuLaney","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXwEYUSy8t0AqOiNpYBo8V940_bCn9SfwrI7H5WI6gjggk1WVd3kQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I typically dont make complaints but the prices are not only high considering the quality of the food but the service is also poor. The tonkotsu shio broth tasted like water and the chicken karage looked and tasted like the mystery meat you'd get in a school lunch (and pretty sure the egg had previously been frozen because it looked gnarly). The service was also nonexistent. I dont mind waiting to be seated but later the waitress stopped halfway through us speaking while ordering to sit another group immediately and serve other tables their food. If youre looking for half decent ramen its more cost effective to go Silverlake or Ramen Nagi.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAnPGrJhq4XMnJDxHrfbuxt&fid=0x0:0x7b0f8bf8330e721a"],"When":"2025-11-15"},{"Name":"Linda N.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWXUQLK_7OBkxwiDzigEOhr_FFFFitiMJm7q4bM5Hex19M2CNo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Really good ramen (I had the tonkatsu black) and takoyaki. It's a smaller restaurant but very cozy. Service was fine. I'd definitely recommend Yoshiharu to others.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBWiScTm7PgYGk5CDJF2idE&fid=0x0:0x7b0f8bf8330e721a"],"When":"2025-11-11"},{"Name":"James Ly","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLxctNedtPuwjfvZo_XQxgGcLjTxR6e0a7b7SOFyyXjmCbdXw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Pretty good ramen and sushi. Our group ordered the tonkotsu black and spicy miso ramen. Both were very flavorful and filling. We also order the salmon bento box and chicken katsu with curry. Both the bento boxes were good, but katsu seemed a little dry. It's better with the curry, but I wouldn't order it again. The sushi was great. We got the baked salmon roll and crunch fire roll. Both were fresh and delicious! I would come back to try the other ramen.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKENPNrNTuyJiVoQE&fid=0x0:0x7b0f8bf8330e721a"],"When":"2025-5-12"},{"Name":"Caliboy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLtWRCZnr5tU1l2aNNoDm0nempfVYc8ZZpjidfnXd8csdQggA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Overall, it was a good place for a family dinner, but the prices were high, and they needed more than one server. Since it was a rainy day, there were many pickup orders, which seemed to slow things down. We didn’t receive water until our main ramen arrived. A few tables left and canceled their orders because the wait was too long.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDAnZzlAg&fid=0x0:0x7b0f8bf8330e721a"],"When":"2025-2-11"},{"Name":"Ray Lin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIRP2Z0YE_aNMhibRr2jRMUyAUviL1GZvBlU3BWTxyOEtDbwA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"On Sunday evening, after my son finished his Taekwondo tournament in Tustin, I searched for nearby Ramen restaurants and drove my family to Yoshiharu Ramen.

To my surprise, only one server was attending to 80% of the customers. Since my kids were hungry, we decided not to spend time going to another restaurant. Therefore, we ordered the following items:

•	Tonkatsu Black ($18.00)
•	Tonkatsu Spicy Black ($18.50)
•	Rib Eye Beef Bento ($20.00)

After waiting for 20 minutes, two bowls of Ramen arrived. I almost finished my meal when my wife and daughter realized the Bento had not arrived yet. I asked the server about it, and she apologized, explaining that it was taking longer than expected.

Advice to the Owner: To ensure better business, please consider hiring more servers and not cutting back on labor costs. Customers don’t like waiting.

If the waiting time improves, we will definitely return.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICPntilIA&fid=0x0:0x7b0f8bf8330e721a"],"When":"2024-11-24"},{"Name":"Terry Qian","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLlVtePDLepDAGI3n8_7TBsbPhgZf5DXKS6CfaBQ8KPDe2wPg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Had one of the worst dining experiences at Yoshiharu Ramen. They served me an expired drink (the bottle clearly showed it expired July 25, 2025), and when I brought it to their attention, the staff refused to even take it off the check and acted like they didn’t care at all.

This is completely unacceptable for any restaurant. Serving expired products is a serious health risk, and the lack of accountability and basic customer service made the experience even worse.

If you care about your health and safety, I highly recommend avoiding this place at all costs.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhByWc-e6W7GUYfuQRNWBBGl&fid=0x0:0x7b0f8bf8330e721a"],"When":"2025-8-5"},{"Name":"Cliff J.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWKUQuB0mgsjqAU97i9Ph_Gh6h0YUrKOUv7q8FKB-V0guFWZknK=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"When in OC there's never a shortage of places to try. While we had some great options, we landed on Yoshiharu. Entering the shop, we were met with a surprisingly young staff who were friendly, quick, and knowledgeable of any questions we had about the menu. It was quiet when we arrived but, the dinner rush brought in a few regulars that livened up the atmosphere.

As for the food, the St. Louis BBQ ramen you'll see pictured was a unique and tasty fusion. We expected the rib to dry out one way or another but were pleasantly surprised at the juiciness. The crispy rice spicy tuna was perfect.

We found ourselves up to try the Poké Ramen on the second visit. A fusion of two favorite dishes, this had a nice balance of flavor and freshness!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICj_fnDbg&fid=0x0:0x7b0f8bf8330e721a"],"When":"2024-4-25"},{"Name":"Sveta N-Kim","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWb8nVk3BMdCCjE-FguBLOjBc5s7dKUCKlyeLrJfU8dYjGB2dlJug=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Went there on a whim for mother's day dinner, and it was a hit. We all loved our ramen and appetizers! Very nice smoky flavor to broth and pork, and the eggs in ramen were absolutely perfect. And they had a discount for moms on mother's day - a small thing, but such a nice special touch. Definitely recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID2vob0Zw&fid=0x0:0x7b0f8bf8330e721a"],"When":"2022-5-16"}]

[{"Name":"Joyce Alonzo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWskdosUF2jJaK8qViuW0E1z_JDlGYbAZgHofAiN1ydqY0V2nMV3A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Our holiday outing had us in this area (Tanaka Farms), and we were quite famished after much walking around in the cold!
Glad they stay open later, joined the Yelp waitlist while about 20 minutes away, and still had to wait maybe another 10 more minutes for a table (they are so busy!).
Located in a plaza next to other restaurants, but this was the most packed spot from start to finish. Many customers continued to wait just outside the restaurant.
Available  outdoor seating but it was chilly tonight, so we wanted to dine indoors.
Excellent boiled dumplings, Yuzu karaage (fired chicken) had a strong albeit pleasant yuzu taste, was crunchy and still tender inside. Got handroll spicy tuna and yellowtail - also excellent and quite generously filled.
Tako wasa also very tender, just the right mix of soy and wasabi.
Pork wrapped onigiri (grilled rice balls) with mentai (fish roe) or ume (pickled plum)
I have been searching for a Yuzu shio (yuzu salt) ramen and finally found this to have the best flavored ramen. I added wood ear mushrooms and half poached egg to mine. Noodles to broth ratio are just the right amount, i often end up with extra broth at the end, and not enough noodles.
The rest of our table each got the Tonkotsu, Spicy Tonkotsu, Shrimp ramen and Torigara Ramen (chicken broth).
The pork slices were very tender, with a slight amount of char (no bitter aftertaste) .
Each ramen dish had a very different flavorful broth, and you can add on whatever you desire.
There is a separate Yakitori ordering menu.
We got chicken thigh with onion, chicken skin, cartilage and chicken oyster  - each skewer was cooked perfectly , meat was tender, chicken skin had a slightly sweet glaze on it.
Attentive and courteous servers.
Lots of parking.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCeERWJzuDHENnPVCrQ6Oxd&fid=0x0:0x58485b5a6232b4b6"],"When":"2025-12-9"},{"Name":"Daniel M Garcia (Pawncheaux)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXEW7272xfnX0MSkyIQAukoAk_0uPmUWCM_gOBXHoLFbsEZSEdRww=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"the pork belly with plum shiso is memorable! this bite is my favorite bite of yakitori in SoCal. the remainder of the yakitori is mindfully prepared. well seasoned.

ramen is not bad and overall a classic chill izakaya atmosphere.

not only would I go back, I'm actively looking for excuses to take foodie friends who are into yakitori.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD33p8GiMyfsulMpmuZP48x&fid=0x0:0x58485b5a6232b4b6"],"When":"2026-1-5"},{"Name":"Ria L.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL7jvsM9ECMLwEfsbg2DNIuD-HhBB2833tIqYJh9BU-Y-JexBKY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Staff are friendly and very efficient. We were seated right away. Food was delicious and ingredients were fresh. Broth super good on the ramen we had. Plus they are open late. We would be back again to try the other foods on the menu.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA_AqSRQJjtRUQ1J4t1iTs0&fid=0x0:0x58485b5a6232b4b6"],"When":"2025-12-1"},{"Name":"Yon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWvOdctT1A4kPJ09YC4As5hqNBwd3MHs3LYJBBOcmMVsXWXnHsf=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Love their Yakitori, fries, sashimi, roll, oyster, and much more. Every food tastes great and fresh.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB4HmDpRlRNhcpqM96__n75&fid=0x0:0x58485b5a6232b4b6"],"When":"2026-1-11"},{"Name":"James Taylor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXzhoUdgPpu-y-8yInRCoCFxUTB43lnuEsWMVNgN_XNnneaOpwU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place hit the spot! Excellent ramen and the asparagus wrapped with beef belly went great with it. Total price for the two was only $22 so pretty budget friendly for great food made in front of you in this area.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAdzBdbyXYk6d7_E6T1k2gZ&fid=0x0:0x58485b5a6232b4b6"],"When":"2026-2-2"},{"Name":"Maria Vee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVzR91lKusVQa4GJu4sTvTDmJ58M3M3ROc1HoDsqD1pOdusynx7=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great Izakaya off of 55 x 405; Just 2 exits from John Wayne airport! Reserved on Yelp and was seated right away on a busy Friday night. It’s a small restaurant with a nice bar facing the skewer grill area. LOTS of choices from Yakitori (meat skewers), hand rolls, ramen, karaage, crunch roll, elote tempura (!), chicken skin and the list goes on… plus a whole lot of wines and soju available.

We ordered a lot of skewers: all well-seasoned/ marinated. We shared a good size spicy tonkotsu ramen, broth is delicious and the kick is just right. They charge extra 75cents for every add-on (corn, mushroom, green onion, etc).  Scallop/ salmon hand rolls start at $10 and specialty rolls start at $16.

Service is fast and friendly. We’ll be happy to return to try the other items on the menu.

More food/travel on IG: @i_therefore_conclude","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEKe_g4y3tYvwRQ&fid=0x0:0x58485b5a6232b4b6"],"When":"2025-5-10"},{"Name":"Ben Park","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUVRanzrLEVlDJALuXs27Aasi3fpJ_MsUvs5sqABQV9oIuZP4woTg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent ramen, karaage, and lamb. They have an extensive beverage menu with tons of sake options. They even have a $1000 bottle. They seem to care about service and food quality. The prices for the ramen were affordable. The other appetizers were also good. The staff is efficient and all work hard and are friendly.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDTq-7yBw&fid=0x0:0x58485b5a6232b4b6"],"When":"2024-5-28"},{"Name":"Valerie Smylie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWTdQCZguvN5j5QYMIa3mcn8sRItlUUtOO5eyFQeKq60ZHQBfnRxg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This little gem was super busy Friday night. We were happy they stay open late on weekends because we had not realized how late it was when we were trying to go get dinner. They have amazing ramen, sushi, and yakitori. I think its one of a few places that offer all 3 of those things at a japanese restaurant, and the quality is there in each item. They dont have a lot of fancy sushi rolls like other places, but their minimal offerings allow for freshness and ultimate flavor. It was a tight fit in the restaurant becuse they were packed in tight that night but it made the experience very cozy. My husband and I have enjoyed a few date nights here, as it is always a hit.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Jenny Liu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJp6JPe1WBuyVNF83owDrIJrOOJaCtp2-8mvhhassZ0b2j-oA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Kitakata never disappoints when it comes to their ramen. The quality of their ramen is always a 10/10. I've been coming here religiously for the past 8 years whenever I visit Orange County.

My go to ramen is the green chili shio ramen. I love that the broth is light and it has a kick from the fresh green chili. I like it extra spicy since I like the burn so I would ask for extra of the green chili. Their chashu is always a nicely sliced even layer and if you're big on meat, they have a ramen option to get more meat (chashu ramen). I also really like the texture of their ramen. It's flat and thicker than normal ramen noodles.

I feel like today's service was kind of slacking a bit. They forgot our extra chili that we ordered and when asking for extra napkins, they forgot about it.

Parking is limited when it gets busy and during rush hour, there will be a wait time so make sure to join the waitlist on yelp if you're in the area before arriving to cut down on wait time.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDLBQk1MFcr8IhYkpoGcbfH&fid=0x0:0x2af5995d2925ac68"],"When":"2025-10-27"},{"Name":"THANG THAI HOA PHAN","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU4pxmA0ey9tWs81viRDYfp2cvIGEEivPQt0_T45x3vQaMTHT7K=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We joined the waitlist and the staff was new they missed us for more than 1hr. We need come reminding them. The food was worth of waiting, I specially like the noodle, it’s not at every ramen shop to have. The noodle size is a little bit bigger, but it was al dente cooked, even it stayed long in the broth, it didn’t soften itself.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDf4AbevTTc8QapTlptVzCR&fid=0x0:0x2af5995d2925ac68"],"When":"2025-10-21"},{"Name":"Amy Kanjana P.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWFLyj9xhC1zZGJuxxTxnpg2P8hiFPh8CRAQ3y2LMr7GLcnctj9=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I just went here today with my BF. Stopped by during the way to the beach ⛱️.
I ordered tan tan ramen (L)🍜, fried chicken, green chili ramen 🍜 and I want to try the curry 🍛😋
For me, everything looks great but a little bit too salty for me. The portion of food was perfect but I ordered a large size for myself 😂 and I can't finish it. I really like the fried chicken and the curry. They had new menus for summer like sour soups ramen 🍜.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCDGKCGdmnlv_r0CFr7uF09&fid=0x0:0x2af5995d2925ac68"],"When":"2025-6-20"},{"Name":"Tom Vo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJLYjgkMdcIZZ_-LQ4vKVCqAv-dpQAUghJO7bh_dmdEFuRT4eqQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Came here to try the Kitakata style of ramen and wasn’t disappointed. Very tasty broth and ramen was just right.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAhbur1rQa0UGxVnA5ozg-7&fid=0x0:0x2af5995d2925ac68"],"When":"2025-10-19"},{"Name":"VINH LE","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWC35vjT-PybvPQiqEWEY4JoqmSiTMT-fURJw3k9bX8v90FJnNs=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This ramen shop is a true local favorite! Though small, the space is perfectly cozy and efficiently organized, creating a warm atmosphere. The food is consistently the main attraction—always delicious, perfectly prepared, and offered at a very reasonable price point, making it an incredible value. Beyond the fantastic bowls, the service is outstanding. The staff is remarkably efficient and expeditious, even with new team members, and they genuinely ensure every single customer leaves happy. This spot nails the perfect balance of great food, great value, and great service. Highly recommended!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Javier","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVzlvnBvPytUfgR45Hx_ZzzvvTLFz5zJCjDz8lIyqDya2tKqG4=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently visited Kitakata Ramen for lunch, and as always, it was an absolute delight. This place never fails to impress, and my latest visit was no exception. We ordered the Miso Spicy Ramen and the Umakara Tan Tan Ramen, both of which were bursting with flavor and perfectly executed. e Miso Spicy Ramen had a rich, savory broth with just the right amount of heat, while the Umakara Tan Tan Ramen was a harmonious blend of umami and a subtle kick of spice. The noodles were cooked to perfection—chewy and satisfying.

We also started with the fried chicken as an appetizer, and it was crispy on the outside, juicy on the inside, and seasoned just right. It’s the perfect way to kick off a meal here.

One thing I always appreciate about Kitakata Ramen is the generous portions. There’s always plenty of food, and I often find myself taking leftovers home—though it’s hard to stop eating because everything is so delicious!

I’ve been here many times, and the consistency in quality is remarkable. The atmosphere is warm and inviting, making it a great spot for a casual lunch or dinner. The service is always friendly and attentive, adding to the overall enjoyable experience.

If you’re a ramen lover or just looking for a satisfying meal, Kitakata Ramen is a must-visit. The food keeps me coming back for more, and I’m already looking forward to my next visit!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCglru74gE&fid=0x0:0x2af5995d2925ac68"],"When":"2025-2-16"},{"Name":"Cecilia Nguyen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjViARW0KNPjQ6MT9XRWcES13qV4UZDbSah_w9O0TWVIEdUSHFAwXQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love coming to Kitakata Ramen. It's a light and delicious broth with soft and chewy noodles.

The Karaage fried chicken is my favorite. It's big juicy pieces with a yummy dipping sauce. Don't forget to put a bit of lemon on top.  🍋 🤤

Parking in this plaza can be really tough because of the small lot and tight parking spaces.  I recommend coming early and checking in on Yelp for a wait-list.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAQ3XsFMxclPufHUdcVRjxr&fid=0x0:0x2af5995d2925ac68"],"When":"2025-6-29"},{"Name":"Joel Galindo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW06LLtyoIe7YsS7USm9FFhosVG9sAcvgWiB44XVDldnmm9csUA0w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My first time having Ramen and I loved it! Look at my pictures as I pointed what I got and I highly recommend it! It was about $40 for 2 people and make sure to sign in using the tablet in front. My girlfriend loves Ramen and she said she would come back as she's pretty special with food! I'll be coming back. The service was pretty good as well! It's a pretty small place and parking can be hard to find but the cars come and go quickly so just find a spot to wait. I got the miso Ramen.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDB-7esJA&fid=0x0:0x2af5995d2925ac68"],"When":"2023-1-30"}]

[{"Name":"Charlene So","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWNMTfWwC5Z7GNr_nIr7vhBWqkC08mq_DQ9nvTdLakuW_urP5BPSw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"There was virtually no wait and it was perfect for a cold night! Got the #5 and a potato croquette. Everything was fresh, hot and the croquette was crispy. The garnish needed a refill but I asked and they quickly took care of that with fresh ingredients. Tables were clean in all locations. Utensils area was well kept as well as the free water dispenser. Everyone was super friendly and helpful. Highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD6xNvoe0YU8AVKYFazOG2S&fid=0x0:0xa4c574396d1339ea"],"When":"2026-1-24"},{"Name":"vivian nguyen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVq-iB8ssLew-PDQAPMClE-0otptmDAqHJSUM_X9CP4i--DksIb=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I got the chicken katsu tomotama curry and it was the best udon ive ever had :D!!!!!! My bf got curry nikutama and that bowl was cleared!!! Tempura was perfectly crisp and hot. Everyone serving us was super nice as well. Definitely coming back soon <3","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDAx67153q7c_jdKgCp3HJE&fid=0x0:0xa4c574396d1339ea"],"When":"2026-1-30"},{"Name":"Clive Arce","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWb1guGBCcGM9dbvxLmyNUBpuKk4FaEq1alamYejGWS2MwMEycR=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great spot to eat if you enjoy Udon noodles. All the ingredients are fresh. Fresh tempura was very tasty and the service is on point.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDbwCEepAAil2zFTQBQXukJ&fid=0x0:0xa4c574396d1339ea"],"When":"2026-2-12"},{"Name":"Emma Wangchen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVNLQgnzxVV5RKUb8ard_p4xxU30mUtSZlkPauWPsukyGxlfoJK=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Clean, clear, quick and yummy

Got the customer loved nikutama and it was very quickly assembled. You can add on any tempura on the little tray sliding thing and checkout at the end. Complimentary sliced green onions and minced ginger and tempura flakes, also the Japanese 7 spice and tempura dipping sauce is self serve.

I like the very easy and well explained ordering process (they have little signs saying what goes with what too). If I lived in the area I’d easily add this to places I’ll go to throughout the week.

For my food, I liked how it wasn’t too heavy in flavor like just a subtle sweet aftertaste. Beef was great too, and adding ginger definitely boosted the flavor. I also loved the chewiness of the udon noodles, and the fact that it’s handmade in the restaurant is even more cool.

If I were to gripe about this place, it’s really nit picky but my egg yolk was already broken when I got my bowl :( but that’s not really a big deal. Also tempura is kind of expensive..but it was still pretty good! Tried a tempura sweet potato and it’s definitely starchy-you gotta dip into the sauce for it to absorb all the flavor

Otherwise, solid place and I would come again, if not to just try the other stuff here. Not too busy either and we came at about 1:30","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAhMauiLPjhRusXgV2ldF2D&fid=0x0:0xa4c574396d1339ea"],"When":"2025-9-3"},{"Name":"Emil Anasov","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUhUUUXTXCOmG9nRpOXqDQJ1_Q4S1pxBPdg2hQAuTIFKU9ZX8g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Sellers began to treat customers much worse, do not answer the question and ignore, I eat here once every 2 days, asked to put more broth. But I was ignored. I said the same thing to the round seller. He said that this portion is normal in his opinion. Because of one spoon of broth that they didn’t add, they ruined the whole good impression of the restaurant. This is the last time I come. They refused a glass of hot water at the cash register.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDNgx-dEGSJ0XXFvHRKwkTL&fid=0x0:0xa4c574396d1339ea"],"When":"2026-1-5"},{"Name":"Robert","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXKeWjyQ3iQUkcgdEmyJyz7Xmqg-yGvd9GFrN0OG1Dk3bBEbiqAqw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Veggies were black and didn't seem fresh. The beef is too sweet and got very thirsty after eating the udon.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBscH3rQPMJO58a_qfJoy3v&fid=0x0:0xa4c574396d1339ea"],"When":"2026-1-3"},{"Name":"Ray Lin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIRP2Z0YE_aNMhibRr2jRMUyAUviL1GZvBlU3BWTxyOEtDbwA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We took the family out for dinner and got lucky with a big table. This location is smaller than the one in Torrance.

Food was tasty and service was friendly. But the pickup process needs improvement. One bowl was meant for someone who ordered earlier, and another was for someone behind us. Staff gave us the wrong items while we were still in line.

Overall, it’s a good spot for a quick family meal.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAN6LThCikL1emXaL-HQh50&fid=0x0:0xa4c574396d1339ea"],"When":"2025-8-14"},{"Name":"A K","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjULU4TKVskgvt-TwPGZulAsxJAGIXzislIgG96GseN0r5cvhO0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great spot with truly customer-focused service. We chose a soup ourselves, but it turned out to be too sweet for our taste. Lance went out of his way to help and replaced it with a different soup at no extra charge. That level of care is rare these days. Big thanks to Lance for being attentive and solution-oriented, and to the restaurant for treating guests so well. We’ll definitely be back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBUpfLQq2H3ZDE03WI3ZCrp&fid=0x0:0xa4c574396d1339ea"],"When":"2026-2-22"}]

[{"Name":"Jesus Ocegueda","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLqrg0OAubTJhN2LE3JF4IS0z1QMwBzcq2b-OFF620-z5r57Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This was my first time eating at Hironori for the first time and was surprised by the entire experience. Food came out on time, tasted amazing and the service was very attentive. The manager, Kris was kind enough to give us a rundown of the popular items and help out make our choice for our lunch. Will be coming back to this location.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD5of92J0Mze1lwE8v-FMEk&fid=0x0:0x33d8aee6420404cf"],"When":"2025-11-30"},{"Name":"David Rottblatt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUUFktJLr57vC8OCdQ_u1Y94v_ktw-gifmrVt7FsNGSF4E8bmc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is amazingly delicious. My absolute favorite are their Eel buns, and if Im a little extra hungry their spicy tuna on crispy rice is also amazing. I tried their ramen (seen in the pics) and jt was also great. Their service is wonderful-they just need a bigger space!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAsloCiua5gaUNoF6eNch7G&fid=0x0:0x33d8aee6420404cf"],"When":"2025-11-11"},{"Name":"Elias Bayati","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXk1pO53jkrxJg8I_z1lIeMLC9p-AhDSgat0dHRI9iqc8eb7Xg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This place is incredible especially their vegan ramen. I am not vegan myself. However, I love the vegan sesame flavored ramen with charred broccolini. However, I find it be overpriced and not so much value for the money. Staff is great and enthusiastic and the creativity is profound.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDQtaWbywE&fid=0x0:0x33d8aee6420404cf"],"When":"2025-3-12"},{"Name":"J Tan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV7Ki4P9nPgchJVwvClGtUTJKspk8PzaBliNPg9d_Li7QZKno5FSg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"On the back of the menu, it tells the story that they grow their own wheat and craft the ramen themselves. You can definitely tell the noodles were more chewy. We tried the Shoyu Ramen and the pork rice bowl, and both were delicious. The restaurant is tiny and there's limited indoor seating, but you can sit outdoor on a nice day. There's limited service, you just make your order at the counter, grab a number, and they will bring the food out to you.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKELC3-YaA4drylgE&fid=0x0:0x33d8aee6420404cf"],"When":"2025-5-11"},{"Name":"Ian Silva","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVmJoHAg-lhaaZGn6cmZIT5nwD_hIHCo7RkhvACsqRTtMfRa451=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I used to love this spot. For some reason, it feels like the recipe changed. The last 3 times I’ve gotten it, the broth is darker and the taste is not the same of 2 years ago. I feel like something changed from November 2025 or around that time. Really sad, this was my favorite tonkatsu spot 😭","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Valentina Velieva","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVI1l0pZPUJlYWCMq8Cc1ilNgsgBxvXQA9oWfnpf2AcN2yXypQx=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Used to be our favourite spot for past 8 months or so. I don't know what happened but the wait times are super long and inconsistent. We always get for here but outside seating but lately started noticing that people seated inside get food sooner even if they arrived later. Really frustrating. Several times they have forgotten to bring side orders or the whole order. They were apologetic but after multiple times I'm not sure we can wait outside as its been colder. It's not their fault but this irvine apartment plaza does not have outdoor heaters set up so you are guaranteed to freeze in the evening, especially with the wait times.
Also some of the food has been lower quality lately. I have gotten cold dipping noodles many times before, last night the sauce was so unbearable and too acidic/vinegary and completely ruined my taste buds rest of the night.
Tonkatsu ramen is good but the pork lately has been more fatty that meaty.
Shoyu ramen is ok but they use waaaay too much oil. I always order it expecting to be a bit lighter than tonkatsu but the amount of oil on top is insane.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lou de Guzman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKsUtAaUTfTBdBwfesHyHBruDFDk-LkDPCKYqu5ccP9e3O2iA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Probably my last time going to Hironori. I think it's changed from when they first opened near SNA. The noodles are slightly larger and not as firm and the tonkotsu broth is overly rich and fatty as if industrially made with large pressure cookers and emulsion blenders. I'm no longer a fan and will be looking for a different go-to ramen spot. Although the black garlic oil is still good and the seared chasu is not bad. Sayonara Hironori.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michelle Zamarripa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocImgUX3t07mchuXsA8-3VqBvsgNslTQ4xb6kV-7mya4Xdj7zg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Usually, Hiro Nori has an exemplary record for amazing Tonkotsu Ramen. I don’t know what they put into the broth this time, but it was definitely NOT tonkotsu!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDwv7zDsI0WTKDe6kcLAB3P&fid=0x0:0x33d8aee6420404cf"],"When":"2025-11-27"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Andrew Irianto","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXwielgKzvQ-9p7XwA86wobZTqMiNggcQWnhVwKsjNbyq_jISw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had to wait about 40 minutes because there were a lot of people ahead. My group decided to just look at the menu ahead of time so that we knew what we wanted.

I had the spicy tonkotsu and also paid about 7 dollars extra for a specialty roll of my choice. I got the eel and avocado roll, but you can see what my group got. I think the middle roll was the rainbow roll, top one was spicy salmon roll.

Restaurant was a bit loud for me, but it was the weekend so I should have prepared for that. Service was fast, attentive, and prompt.

Spicy tonkotsu ramen was indeed spicy. Pork was good with char and the noodles were a good consistency, not too soft with just enough firmness. Broth was warm and feeling. Rolls were good for their value.

Can't say say anything bad about it. Maybe the usage of the "krab" was a bit excessive, but I'm nitpicking for a 7 dollar roll.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBzRNSZgVgyL1ii7sCT0kRH&fid=0x0:0x8fc845cf01b0dcb5"],"When":"2025-12-17"},{"Name":"Ray Lin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIRP2Z0YE_aNMhibRr2jRMUyAUviL1GZvBlU3BWTxyOEtDbwA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"3/8/2026 Update: They raised the menu prices and the add‑on prices. It’s not the same value anymore, and the deal that made it worth coming here is basically gone.

***********************************

After my son’s soccer practice in Tustin, we stopped by Ramen Mura—just a quick 7-minute drive.

They offer a great deal: ramen with an add-on. We ordered three ramen bowls and three sushi add-ons. Everything was fresh, flavorful, and satisfying. The service was friendly, and the atmosphere was relaxed and family-friendly.

My whole family enjoyed the meal, and we’ll definitely be back. Great spot for a casual dinner with good value.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDs9sEJCvAfRoKsI9OhKGMn&fid=0x0:0x8fc845cf01b0dcb5"],"When":"2025-10-13"},{"Name":"heidy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWARyKgj7Wp3uOLFJPy7bZaQSb_G8NPPmNwtMnpdX1tKL8EiEg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cute atmosphere, employees were very relaxed and able to talk with each other (which I love), but also checked up on my boyfriend and I frequently, refilling our waters & drinks and making sure everything was yummy! They gave us our bill as soon as we were done, no waiting, service was great, quick, and the waitresses are very attentive + sweet! The food was 10/10. I got the spicy tonkotsu ramen, it was bomb!! The soft boiled egg was perfectly cooked, broth not too salty, just perfect!! Noodles are delicious and flavorful! My bf got the spicy habanero ramen and it was also delicious!! We got the salmon roll and I got a dragon roll for my mom (which she loved). Everything 10/10, highly recommend for sushi + ramen.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCMXvAIuJN2KIn8ANYlPDW4&fid=0x0:0x8fc845cf01b0dcb5"],"When":"2026-1-28"},{"Name":"Ellen M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ0KAkSmAcPCoUtAdvK1M9uKl0FOBnkqf4vJZfi5wPboWncvA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We came here for dinner with our kids and really enjoyed it. We ordered ramen and appetizers — my daughter had the mild Tonkotsu Ramen, my son had the regular Habanero Ramen, and I tried the extra spicy version. Everything was delicious, and the appetizers were a perfect match.

Our server was so kind and friendly, with a warm smile that made the whole experience even better. We had a wonderful dinner here!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCUAyDBXejPnAFtJBL5yfhi&fid=0x0:0x8fc845cf01b0dcb5"],"When":"2025-8-17"},{"Name":"pradeesh U","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVzEe2xbXtRsYe6R_pRZkvsuH5xWUwIuH7VTCirix5A5w6oZd2BQg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The food was really good and flavorful. I tried the spicy tonkotsu ramen—it was very spicy, but in a good way, and I really enjoyed it.
The place is small with limited seating, so I ended up getting takeout, but the quality of the food was still excellent. The broth was rich and satisfying, and the spice level actually delivered.
Definitely a good spot if you’re looking for bold, spicy ramen, just be aware that seating is limited.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jade","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVe00fBdpDSs41tpfzsU3EbWy1-gpqkPTWD_jjVdGvwicIo75vgFw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing customer service. They also have amazing food. Go here if you want good ramen!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDpWbEy4mKCPnQj5xfCfrAt&fid=0x0:0x8fc845cf01b0dcb5"],"When":"2026-1-10"},{"Name":"Sylvia D.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWhV6qxprK2JhNT5FADTM5c6ZNTNvyFT8zKZvZvn2u_MHQbofaV8A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Soooo good! Food is delicious and service was great!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAFCTzqBXGlt92WILyfQeu3&fid=0x0:0x8fc845cf01b0dcb5"],"When":"2026-3-8"},{"Name":"Linda","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUZyQPorEGUNCpNc-WYokFNr74tW5qdj97SFf30P6DpKu4SeE7Y=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cute little spot for ramen and sushi. Everything tastes as expected and seems consistent. Staff are friendly and quick. Theres limited parking spots since it shares the lot with other businesses nearby","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDPXPqYvd4d2mXte_f7KCL5&fid=0x0:0x8fc845cf01b0dcb5"],"When":"2025-6-26"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Eri Yoshida","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUNHHtfN56EuGQNSRJgbFOaacbBLi95JSHahv4InnR8tt-lRaY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It was through their first anniversary flyer that I learned about this establishment, and I am glad that I decided to try their ramen. Their gyoza blew me away! Though I am not certain if they make it in the kitchen, I can assure you that it was not from a package. There is a lot of meat packed inside, and they make that crisp blanket on top. I enjoyed the Tonkotsu Ramen, but I would like to try other ramen dishes in the future. The spicy tsukemen has been reviewed by other individuals. On the menu, I did not see it, but perhaps I did not look closely enough. It is a fairly spacious restaurant with a large number of booth tables, which is suitable for family dining. After all, I am looking forward to trying other dishes in the future!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCDLmHgItO1D_q4SpgdFnq4&fid=0x0:0xfc125cd860dbaeb6"],"When":"2025-7-29"},{"Name":"M A S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVGPp36TPvev5XJaeBZw41Yt1bFadm0bPQMX8Jx-hdCORkRSi-0zQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Finally opened in mid to late July 2025. Super long lines out the door the first weekend but i went on the second weekend it was open and was able to walk right in and grab a table.
For the ramen purists, my review might not have enough street cred because I ordered the vegan ramen with thin noodles,..but it was delicious. Terrific broth, nice noodle texture, and enjoyable Woods Ear mushrooms.
Their hot sauce is also quite good with a real flavor!
I wish they offered tofu or chicken as an add-in, but they don’t—oh well.
I washed it down with a green iced barley tea.
Service was on point.
Atmosphere is meh.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCVZ_R6QYKTgW2iyJMS1fiU&fid=0x0:0xfc125cd860dbaeb6"],"When":"2025-7-29"},{"Name":"Nhi Nguyễn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVaKccuuBRaOndv5hUleneUPmeJgyCotixLRUz3wMQMB4ulZcM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food is delicious. The rich version is a little too salty for my taste but the light version is fantastic. It's best eaten with a flavored egg, they make it perfect.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBqNn3_8Qw0az8owOj-5TGF&fid=0x0:0xfc125cd860dbaeb6"],"When":"2025-12-19"},{"Name":"Emiko Kawashima","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUkEXEs2JmbP5HYbP_hxCMMsaSCU_l3HFWrre6nEdNIbNR5WJtB=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Six of us arrived there at 7 pm on Friday. We were very fortunate that there was a handful of people (though the establishment was full) due to the World Series baseball game playing in LA. We were seated in a timely manner. Four of us wanted to try this seasonal special, Pumpkin Ramen because it was available only for a week. Thick noodles in pumpkin broth was so tasty. Though it is a vegetarian ramen, we were completely satisfied. We also tried gyoza, which was made automatically! I also ordered lemonade, which came in a bottle, with some fizz.. This was absolutely fantastic! Iwould definitely recommend this establishment.

Dined at Tatsunoya on a Thursday evening. Arrived there before 7 pm, and it looked like the first wave of customers just left; hence, no wait for us. We were seated at a booth, which was very comfortable. I ordered their monthly special, “spicy tsukemen” brothless noodle. It was spicy, and I especially liked the texture, cubed purple cabbage, etc.  I was also given a tablespoon of vinegar for altering its flavor, which gave mildness to the taste. In the end, I added a small bowl of rice to completely finish the dish. Oh, it was delightful! I look forward to the next monthly special.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDXhuvdFw&fid=0x0:0xfc125cd860dbaeb6"],"When":"2024-10-26"},{"Name":"Bonnie Floyd","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWCYgLIpQZeAVcL4m8SgTjcQNgPv-K73E-kMs39W3mnCjVIr73s=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great Ramen! Lots of options. This location was packed and the staff was highly efficient. We will be back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhADBn3TgVun5rbYfY-VsTef&fid=0x0:0xfc125cd860dbaeb6"],"When":"2025-11-28"},{"Name":"DUCC DUCC","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVHlPUkSmRNaN4cQIgMnCmZIimiS-48g1_ljDcaw88QT8r5txIv=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I got the light tonkotsu ramen with gyoza. The gyoza filling has a pretty strong ginger taste but they are big and worth the $12 i paid for them. The soup was very good and tasted not as salty as I expected. The ramen noodle came thin. A nice perk of this place is that they give you storage stools to store your bags in if you sit next to the wall. I do wish the sliding door restroom came with a hook inside to hang your belongings though.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDQ1MvkGg&fid=0x0:0xfc125cd860dbaeb6"],"When":"2025-3-9"},{"Name":"Rachel Krumenaker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWsJ3MtLm-elxfYL8G6VMsRMmrIxqYS81qvy52EWE0aHArlX4uh=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This Raman was delicious!! Best gyoza I’ve had in this area too. The tuna sushi tasted fresh too! We had it to go, so I bet it’s somehow even better in person. Highly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Essam Iskander","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXyObnBowq4nF7geWR2VZLwowUh_pQ19NvAncGyGVLjOMQ6sUC3bw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely amazing vegan ramen! The broth was rich and flavorful, with a depth that’s hard to find in plant-based dishes. Everything tasted fresh and authentic—from the noodles to the mushroom and veggies. Easily one of the best vegan ramen bowls I’ve ever had!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDI6NvkBg&fid=0x0:0xfc125cd860dbaeb6"],"When":"2025-4-6"}]

[{"Name":"Doug Katsumoto","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKi_5ydAoVLgcQ7aX-bey3q6F-BcPnpkYM6E4niNX_c74q2H1Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"First time here.  Last time here.

We were seated fairly quickly and our order was taken in a reasonable amount of time.

We never got our food.  Our order was never put in.

I never post reviews.  If a business is good, they don't need reviews.  People know.  This was unacceptable.

Went to Kitakata Ramen instead.  Their ramen was very good!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDAKpOx4UOTRhK_Ae_SH6tV&fid=0x0:0xb58e35b234a682f8"],"When":"2025-12-8"},{"Name":"Albert H","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUJlx7w2oqZg3vspZViNVyGdUIELoB3KK-xfmRntQgHorCIQvD5=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Amazing, super delicious Ramen - reinvented in the U.S. so the soup is totally drinkable. If you've ever eaten Ramen in Japan, you know what I'm talking about. The dining area in-store is modern and clean, but sometimes the long waiting line can be a turn-off, at least to me.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDOGRXP0m_6YlLlX117JlJE&fid=0x0:0xb58e35b234a682f8"],"When":"2025-9-14"},{"Name":"Ammi Martinez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV2rNew1cZYWmeeZC4Z6-SnViVyLlVwYMgovcsYocOcAFGqcbbs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The place is small but as soon as you walk in you understand why this place is so special (very well decorated and different look thab most places). It is extremely clean, service on point, food came out at the right time but most importantly it was sooooooo delicious. We got the veggie ramen, chicken ramen and the crispy chicken. 😋 😍","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCRtYyBngrllCiB-V0fmZ7M&fid=0x0:0xb58e35b234a682f8"],"When":"2026-2-20"},{"Name":"Tina Fragassi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWBA7d_oKUwMFKLLd6CFWHlAbMosYa0PSQjESjARCAssRvCNP62=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This little gem in Tustin, Hiro Niro makes the absolute best Ramen that I have ever tasted in my life.
It was so delicious and they have many locations. Their teriyaki bowls are also the best. They are so nice there and they make homemade noodles and garlic that are just so outrageously delicious. I am a huge fan. I would give them 100 stars.❤️❤️❤️","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jennifer Starlight","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUmrJKjgBMZGImE8bp3hGp2g8j6aEAjbcPY3ny2jtuH0n6dUa8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The ramen was delicious, as always. HiroNori continues to deliver when it comes to flavor, quality, and consistency of the food. The broth was rich and satisfying, and the overall meal absolutely lived up to expectations.
That said, a couple of things stood out on this visit.
The service was a bit inattentive. We waited quite a while to flag down a server just to get sugar, and one of our ramen bowls arrived without a spoon. I eventually had to get up from the table and find one myself. It wasn’t rude service, just noticeably absent at times.
The bigger issue was the bathroom. It really needs a deep cleaning or some remodeling. The walls were visibly stained, which made the space feel neglected and unpleasant, especially for an otherwise well-regarded restaurant.
Food-wise, HiroNori is still excellent. If the service were more attentive and the bathrooms better maintained, this location would easily match the overall quality of the brand.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Fixi handyman services","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXZLdt3AsCRoaz4grF3c-7z7wWMDVOM0PBZLcdoVuQ2hXQ8UKk3=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"As always, everything was excellent! The staff are friendly and professional. The dishes are delicious and beautifully presented.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB9Jg9gElfIWUBidZFOSWw-&fid=0x0:0xb58e35b234a682f8"],"When":"2025-12-14"},{"Name":"Allen Green","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVWHeDJ0j8B7ClU2ZO3-HWKnZIg3x3elbxMgx8E27WE2c70dOpy=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I finally made it to HiroNori after hearing about them quite a few times, and it’s a solid spot for ramen. I tried a bunch of stuff — Tonkotsu Ramen, Vegan Ramen, Spicy Cold Dipping Noodle, Crispy Chicken, and Pork Buns. The Spicy Cold Dipping Noodle really stood out, and the Crispy Chicken was surprisingly good too. The tonkotsu and vegan bowls were solid — broth had good depth, noodles were on point, nothing over the top but definitely well done. The pork buns were fine, rounded out the meal, nothing fancy. Prices are fair for the quality, and the vibe is casual. Space is a bit tight, so it can get busy, but nothing crazy. Overall, it’s a dependable ramen spot and definitely worth swinging by if you’re in the area.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDwFzhNYstnx0FanIUel6Lm&fid=0x0:0xb58e35b234a682f8"],"When":"2025-12-5"},{"Name":"urNEWstepDAD","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXsQ6vxzZz4TjZaWpkXKRp0529L_CFIz61KMOw9TyMoySvxxXmQMQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Vegan ramen with vegan gyoza as an appetizer. Your welcome. But seriously this place is amazingly delicious. Manager is great, the level of service from this man is above and beyond, the server forgot a side of rice(for my daughter) and something else small like a side of broth I can’t remember now, but the order was for takeout and I didn’t check the food before I left because they’re always on point. When I got home I checked and then I called to have the items credited to me for next time but, the manager refunded the money to my credit card and he insisted the food be delivered to me. I gave him my address and he personally delivered to my house in Orange from Tustin. Hiro Nori is and will always be my go to spot.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Sheldon R","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV5Sl3Zk4B-LCwzaFJ6qsM_CrCB8_k9hWzetzvj0MtNmIQu0uhW=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place was very accommodating. They allowed us to dine in w/ our party of 5 at 9:40pm when they were closing at 10pm. They even allowed us to stay until about 10:20-10:30pm w/o making us feel rushed. We felt a little guilty for that and left to not keep them waiting. The food was amazing and the ambiance was great. A little difficult to find this place as it’s inside a business type looking building. The ramen was decorous and filling. Had to take it to go.

Vegan Ramen: 4.5/5","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhActiOVsUiQ9g1CYHqNOQS6&fid=0x0:0xc5767b84fbacbdf3"],"When":"2025-12-20"},{"Name":"Liliana Aguayo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJRyPinEmzp0-Esvf5D89NLGJNfQUeF9EWBZ71al-DH9O_CMA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It’s hidden and  tucked inside an office building, you’ll find the entrance on the side of the first floor. There is plenty of parking, which is always a plus. I love the ambience and aesthetic of the place. It is a small restaurant, so be prepared to wait or join their waitlist. It’s also kid-friendly, which made our visit even better. The staff is friendly, service is good and the restaurant is cashless with the service fee already included no need to tip. They offer beer, sake, and wine. The menu is simple, and everything we tried was amazing. I ordered the small chicken bowl for my little ones, and they loved it. For dessert, they offer two options: green tea mochi or cheesecake. We recommend the green tea mochi comes with two mochi. Pricing is reasonable, and overall this spot is definitely worth visiting!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAOyT7bSZEvWjS3uM6NYd_u&fid=0x0:0xc5767b84fbacbdf3"],"When":"2025-11-20"},{"Name":"Braulio A.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX7oht4_iWzQSwC8VVvAvvQzCDs3xdoyvWq66vSGr7lCnXdC_k=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"HiroNori Craft Ramen House is, without a doubt, one of the best ramen spots around. Tucked away inside a corporate office, this hidden gem can be tricky to find, but the experience is absolutely worth the effort. While the location may be unassuming, the quality of the food speaks volumes.

Parking is limited, and seating inside the restaurant is sparse, so it’s important to plan ahead. Because of this, many visitors opt for takeout, which is an excellent way to enjoy their offerings without worrying about space. Despite these logistical challenges, the flavors here make it all worthwhile.

The ramen itself is carefully crafted, with rich, savory broths and perfectly cooked noodles that leave a lasting impression. Every bowl is thoughtfully prepared, showcasing attention to detail and dedication to quality ingredients.

Whether you’re a ramen enthusiast or just looking for a satisfying meal, HiroNori delivers an experience that goes beyond ordinary fast-casual dining. For convenience and comfort, getting your order to-go is highly recommended. It allows you to enjoy their incredible ramen anywhere, making this small, hard-to-find spot a must-visit destination for anyone who appreciates authentic, flavorful Japanese cuisine.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCUMvFQe5FWm_Rh_eWptLeu&fid=0x0:0xc5767b84fbacbdf3"],"When":"2025-11-25"},{"Name":"long Vu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIEvLV0JDDQcZQkvY_yfZehQj64MEc01zOWD8m1X4WGlYBMLQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Finally got around to trying this place. We came around 7:30pm on a tuesday night and it was packed. We waited around 45 minute for party of 3, I can't imagine how it is on the weekend. Ordered the tonkotsu ramen and it was delicious. This is one of few noodle restaurants be it vietnamese, thai or chinese that the broth is actually hot. You need to blow on it hot, exactly how I want my ramen so that it can cook the scallions, bean sprouts and whatever else you put in. Most noodles shop the broth is not hot enough for my liking but this place exceeded my expectations. The broth is rich and well seasoned. It's definitely one of the better ramen I've had in awhile. Craft is in the name so you're paying for it, almost 20 dollar a bowl. Definitely worth it to try it at least once.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCyPtzD3DkGJumuxftW-25a&fid=0x0:0xc5767b84fbacbdf3"],"When":"2026-1-7"},{"Name":"James Ge","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVcd5GiJ8_dcMsHq_FqGrHbDC9AuBrgUR9smX1ikGnRbnvpLB5s=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"HiroNori Craft Ramen was founded by Hiro Igarashi and Nori Akasaka, who set out to bring a no-shortcuts, truly crafted ramen experience to California (it started in Irvine). You can taste the care in the rich tonkotsu broth, springy noodles, and thoughtful toppings, and the service feels genuinely attentive.
